title: Senior Operations Manager
description:
About the Company



We are a done-for-you Airbnb arbitrage company. We help clients build profitable short-term rental

portfolios without owning property — we handle everything from sourcing and leasing units to

furnishing, listing, and managing them on their behalf. We are a fast-growing team with a high-volume

sales operation and a fulfillment team responsible for delivering results to clients.



About the Role



We are looking for a sharp, proactive Senior Operations Manager to own our day-to-day operations.

You will be the person who makes sure nothing falls through the cracks — so that the owner doesn't

have to.

You will manage a data entry VA, coordinate between our sales team and fulfillment team, QA reports

and agreements, build systems and automations, and ensure that every operational task gets done

without being asked twice. If you need to be told to follow up on something,  this is not the right role for

you. If you solve problems before they become fires, this is exactly the right role.



What You'll Own Day-to-Day



• Review daily sales and marketing reports for accuracy before they reach the owner. Flag and fix

discrepancies before they're reported.

• Monitor end-of-day closer reports. If a closer hasn't submitted or something looks off, investigate

independently (check Zoom recordings, CRM, etc.) before escalating.

• Audit every new client agreement to confirm the correct version was signed. If an agreement is

missing or incorrect, chase it to completion with the closer — without involving the owner.

• Coordinate AR and payment collection: track upcoming client payments, confirm billing details

with the sales team, ensure payments are run on schedule, and resolve any blockers

independently.

• Coordinate between the sales team and the fulfillment team on new client onboarding — making

sure every new Airbnb arbitrage client is handed off cleanly with all documents, payments, and

next steps in order.

• Manage and direct the data entry VA: assign tasks clearly, check her work, and correct errors

before they reach leadership.

• Build and document SOPs for recurring processes. Proactively identify gaps and create

solutions.

• Set up and maintain automations using tools like Zapier, Make, or GoHighLevel to reduce

manual work.



You Are the Right Fit If...



• You have 3+ years of experience as a VA, operations coordinator, online business manager, or

similar role for a US/AU/UK-based online business.

• You have managed or supervised at least one other tea
mber.

• You are extremely comfortable with Google Sheets (formulas, data validation, conditional

formatting).

• You have experience with CRM tools, project management platforms, and/or automation tools.

• You are a native or near-native English writer — clear, professional, and direct.

• You don't wait to be told. When you see a problem, you figure out the next step and take it.

• You are available to work EST hours full time 



Nice to Have



• Experience with GoHighLevel, ClickUp, Notion, Slack, or similar tools.

• Background in high-ticket sales, coaching, or consulting businesses.

• Experience building Zapier or Make automations from scratch.



What This Is NOT



• This is not a data entry role. You will manage someone who does data entry.

• This is not a role for someone who needs hand-holding or constant direction.

• This is not part time



Compensation



$1,200 – $1,800 USD/month depending on experience. Performance-based raises available after 90

days. 



How to Apply

fill out this link here->

title: Lead Generation Specialist (High Ownership Role)
description:
We are hiring a Lead Generation Specialist to support a growing plant-based chef business.

This is a high-ownership, strategic role focused entirely on lead generation.

You will be responsible for managing the full lead flow from start to finish, while thinking critically, identifying opportunities, and taking initiative.



Responsibilities

Research and identify qualified, aligned leads

Initiate and manage conversations across platforms

Qualify leads and move them toward booking

Follow up consistently and intentionally

Manage and track all leads inside GoHighLevel CRM

Keep pipelines organized, updated, and moving

Identify gaps, missed opportunities, and areas for improvement



Requirements

Strong, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (non-negotiable)

Proven experience managing the full lead generation cycle

Strong communication, judgment, and decision-making skills

Ability to take ownership without being managed step by step

Experience with outreach, follow-ups, and lead nurturing



How You’ll Work

This role requires someone who can think and operate independently.

You are expected to:

Bring ideas, not just execution

Think through problems and suggest solutions

Take responsibility for results, not just tasks

Communicate clearly and consistently

This role requires an executive-level mindset applied to lead generation, meaning structure, clarity, and proactive thinking in everything you do.



Work Setup

Part-time or full time

Fixed hours with MST overlap

Daily check-ins and end-of-day updates required

Compensation

$8–$12/hour depending on experience

Opportunity to grow into a larger role over time based on performance



To Be Considered

This role requires initiative, attention to detail, and the ability to think independently.

If instructions are not followed exactly, your application will not be reviewed.

Record a short video and answer the following:

1. Introduction

Who you are and what kind of work you’ve done related to lead generation, outreach, or similar roles.

2. Strategy

Based on what you see about Iwacu Flavors, how would you approach lead generation for this business?

Be specific.

3. Communication

What is your favorite food, and how would you describe it in a way that makes someone want it?



Avoid general answers. We look forward to hearing from you.

strong CRM discipline

clean notes

quality appointments without overqualifying everything



You will be speaking with seller leads and identifying the 4 pillars of the deal:



why

timeline

repairs

price

Pay: $5–$7/hour + performance bonuses

kept appointments

contracts sourced from your pipeline

note quality

speed to lead

follow-up consistency



Requirements:



strong spoken and written English

warm and easy-to-listen-to phone presence

coachable

organized

comfortable with accountability

comfortable making a high volume of calls and follow-ups

able to write clean CRM notes

reliable internet

appointment setting experience

To apply, send all of the following:

Seller inherited property, wants to sell in 2 months, roof is old, house needs paint and flooring, wants $180k, brother is involved

title: Virtual Assistant/Social Media Manager
description:

Every social media post is created with our audience in mind, combining strong visuals, clear captions, and researched hashtags. Need structured Instagram marketing handled by someone who understands content flow, trends, and branding. Work as a content creator and marketing manager, focusing on long-term growth.

Experienced in Customer Service, Admin Support & Data Entry. Provide high-level virtual support across administrative and customer service functions. Managed inquiries via phone and
, delivering prompt, accurate, and empathetic responses to ensure a positive client experience. Excelled in data entry and record-keeping, maintaining organized, up-to-date databases and client files. Actively listening to client concerns and resolved a variety of issues with professionalism and clarity. Known for attention to detail, strong communication skills, and consistent follow-through on tasks and client requests.



Required Services



Customer service

Data Entry

Multi platform management (Instagram,
, TikTok,

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Full Stack AI Developer

About Cynergists: Cynergists builds production-grade AI Agents that automate real business operations. We design systems that replace manual workflows, eliminate bottlenecks, and scale execution without adding headcount. We do not sell ideas, prompts, or experiments. We deploy working infrastructure. Our focus is simple: intelligent automation that ships, runs, and delivers measurable outcomes.

The Role

We are looking for a highly capable Full Stack AI Developer who excels at building and deploying scalable, front-to-back web applications and autonomous AI agents.

In this role, you will be the architectural bridge between our user-facing interfaces and our backend AI operations. You will build lightning-fast frontends using React and Vite, manage robust databases with Supabase, and orchestrate complex, autonomous AI workflows using n8n. If you are a builder who thrives on shipping real-world AI infrastructure and taking total ownership of your stack, we want you on our team.

Must Haves & Key Responsibilities

Front-End Engineering: Proven experience building highly responsive, production-ready interfaces using React and Vite. You build clean, fast, and maintainable user experiences.

Backend & Database Ownership: Hands-on experience architecting and managing databases using Supabase. You understand schema design, authentication, and secure data handling.

Workflow Orchestration: Deep tactical knowledge of n8n. You will design, build, and deploy complex AI workflows that connect our internal tools, external APIs, and LLMs.

AI Agent Construction: You don't just use AI; you build it. You have demonstrable experience constructing, prompting, and deploying autonomous AI Agents to solve specific operational bottlenecks.

Rapid Prototyping: Experience using Lovable to accelerate front-end development and iterate quickly on user interfaces.

Shipping Mentality: You push code through GitHub with proper reviews. You ship working systems weekly, take ownership of outcomes, and are comfortable being accountable for what runs in production.

Requirements

Demonstrable proficiency in React, Vite, Supabase, and n8n.

Experience building and deploying functional AI Agents.

Comfort working in GitHub using branching, pull requests, and code reviews.

Ability to manage work with clear tickets, acceptance criteria, and milestones.

Clear written and verbal communication.

Availability to work with consistent overlap during US business hours.

A Day in the Life

Turn loosely defined operational problems into working AI-driven workflows and sleek user interfaces.

Design and build AI agents that handle intake, processing, storage, notifications, and reporting.

Write clean, production-grade frontend code using React and Vite.

Manage backend data structures and user authentication flows via Supabase.

Map out and deploy complex automation sequences within n8n.

Push code through GitHub and deliver predictable, demoable outcomes.

About the Team Cynergists is a small, senior, execution-first team. There are no passengers here. Everyone builds, ships, and owns what they deploy. We value:

Direct communication

Reliability over cleverness

Working systems over theoretical ones

Accountability without micromanagement

If you are tired of half-built ideas and want to ship AI systems that actually work, you will fit in.

To Apply Send the following to 

Your availability during US hours and whether you want part-time or full-time work.

One to three examples of systems or AI Agents you have shipped (GitHub links, demos, walkthroughs, or screenshots).

A brief explanation of how you would architect a solution utilizing React, Supabase, and n8n.

title: Experienced Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (Florida Market)
description:
Overview:

We are seeking a highly experienced Transaction Coordinator with a strong background in handling Florida real estate transactions from contract to closing. This is not a training role—we need someone who can step in confidently, manage multiple files, and ensure smooth, compliant transactions with minimal supervision.



Key Responsibilities:



-Manage real estate transactions from open to close with accuracy and efficiency

-Handle 15+ active transactions simultaneously

-Coordinate with agents, clients, lenders, title companies, and other parties

-Ensure all documents are complete, compliant, and submitted on time

-Track deadlines, contingencies, and critical dates

-Provide consistent updates to all stakeholders

-Maintain organized and up-to-date transaction files



Requirements:



-Minimum 3 years of experience as a Transaction Coordinator (Florida market preferred)

-Proven ability to independently manage transactions from start to finish

-Advanced knowledge and hands-on experience with Sisu and Follow Up Boss (FUB)

-Strong understanding of Florida real estate contracts and processes

-Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills

-High attention to detail and problem-solving ability

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills



What We’re Looking For:



-Someone proactive, reliable, and detail-oriented

-Able to work with minimal supervision

-Comfortable managing a high-volume workload

-Committed to delivering high-quality support to the team



To Apply:

Please submit your resume along with a brief summary of your experience handling Florida transactions, including the systems you’ve used (Sisu, FUB, etc.) and the average number of transactions you’ve managed at one time.



We are looking for someone who can start immediately and make an impact from day one.

title: Product & Growth VA (Part-Time, 2hrs/day)
description:
Product & Growth VA (Part-Time, 2hrs/day)



We are a UK-registered tech company with a portfolio of live digital products. We need a detail-oriented, versatile VA to support product launches and growth activities.



This is not a general admin role. Your work will directly impact how our products are presented and how we reach new customers.



What you will be doing:



— Creating professional screenshots, mockups, and visual assets

— Writing compelling product descriptions and feature copy

— Building and maintaining product pages and profiles

— Creating short demo and promotional videos

— Lead generation and outreach support

— Light competitor and industry research



What we are looking for:



— Strong eye for design — you know what professional product presentation looks like

— Experience with Canva, Capcut, or similar design tools

— Good English copywriting skills — clear, sharp, no fluff

— Comfortable with basic video editing for product demos

— Experience with lead generation,
 outreach, or prospecting

— Organised and self-driven — you will receive clear daily tasks and be expected to deliver without follow-up

— Fast and reliable.



This is a part-time role — 2 hours per day, Monday to Friday. Work is task-based. Daily tasks will vary between product work and growth activities.



You will be working directly with the founder. No middle management, no meetings, no bureaucracy.



To apply: Send a short message with examples of any product pages, visual assets, or outreach work you have done. Keep it brief.

title: Video Editor & Content Creator – Short & Long Form”
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a talented and reliable video editor to join us on a full-time remote basis. You’ll be editing and creating content across three personal and business brands - including a UK-based large-scale furniture supply company serving property developers, BTR schemes, HMOs, hotels and commercial fit-outs.

What You’ll Be Working On



 • Short-form content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) - fast-paced, engaging, trend-aware

 • Long-form videos - walkthroughs, brand storytelling, supplier/factory visits, project showcases

 • Personal brand content for two individuals (founder and director level)

 • Company content, including project reveals, testimonials and promotional material



What We Need From You

 • Strong editing skills across both short and long form

 • Ability to work from raw footage and bring your own creative direction

 • Experience with on-screen captions, transitions, colour grading and audio sync

 • Reliable, communicative and able to hit deadlines independently

 • Proficiency in Premiere Pro, CapCut or similar, etc...



Details

 • $400/month | 20 hours/week | Full Time

 • Remote | Flexible hours

title: Senior UK Accountant / Bookkeeper | Full Set Accounts | Xero Expert | Up to Php 120,000
description:
Hi, I’m Fiona.



I run a small UK accountancy practice, and I’m looking for one exceptional person to work closely with me long term.



This is not an entry-level role.

This is not a bookkeeping-only role.

This is not a role for someone who needs constant hand-holding.



I need someone who can take work from bookkeeping right through to completed year-end accounts for:



- sole traders

- partnerships

- limited companies



You must already have real UK accounting experience.

That part is non-negotiable.



Please do not apply unless you already have genuine UK accounting experience.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



You will likely be a strong fit if:



- you already understand UK accounting work in practice, not just in theory

- you can prepare a full set of accounts

- you are strong in Xero

- you are comfortable in Excel

- you are organised, accurate, and proactive

- you are happy being back-end, with minimal client contact

- you take pride in clean, tidy, correct work

- you can hit the ground running



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



- full Xero bookkeeping

- bank and balance sheet reconciliations

- preparing sole trader accounts

- preparing partnership accounts

- preparing limited company year-end accounts

- supporting tax return preparation

- preparing and supporting VAT returns

- preparing and supporting payroll

- keeping ledgers, working papers, and files clean and accurate

- catching errors early and fixing them properly

- taking ownership of work and seeing it through



MUST-HAVES



- strong senior-level accounting experience

- real UK accounting experience

- proven ability to prepare year-end accounts for sole traders, partnerships, and limited companies

- strong Xero proficiency — you will be tested on this

- comfortable in Excel

- good written English

- able to work independently without micromanagement

- reliable laptop or PC, strong internet, and quiet work setup

- a second screen is strongly preferred

- professionalism, maturity, and pride in your work



HOW WE WILL ASSESS YOU



This role is for a serious candidate, so we will assess properly.



You will be tested on:



- your UK accounting knowledge

- your ability to handle full sets of accounts

- your Xero proficiency

- how you think and solve problems



Please only apply if you are confident in these areas.



WHO YOU’LL BE WORKING WITH



This is a small, heart-led team — just me, Fiona, and my husband Rudi, who helps with systems and tech behind the scenes.



We both work from home.

It’s personal.

It’s hands-on.

It’s real.



You won’t be just a number here.

We’re not a big agency.

We care deeply about the people who work with us.



WORKING STYLE



We do not use invasive screen-tracking software.



We manage by trust, communication, and output.



HOURS



This is a full-time remote role.



We need reliable overlap with UK time, usually during:



8:00am–12:00 noon UK time



That means a late afternoon / evening shift in the Philippines, depending on the time of year.



PAY



Php 80,000 to Php 120,000 per month for the right candidate.



This is a long-term independent contractor role, not employment.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



In the Philippines, family matters.

It matters to me too.



I built this business so I could be there for my daughters. I want the right person in this role to have that same dignity:



- work from home

- be trusted

- do meaningful work

- be part of something real



We are prepared to wait for the right person.

We care more about finding an A+ long-term fit than hiring fast.



HOW TO APPLY



Apply here:







Use access code:



FJ2026



The application includes a few short questions and a voice recording.



Please complete the application properly, as that is part of how we assess fit for the role.

title: American Sales Person Window Tint
description:
We are a US-based marketing company that books appointments for home service and automotive businesses. We handle the leads. You handle the calls. Your job is to follow up with people who are already interested and book them in for a confirmed appointment.

This is a phone sales role. You will be calling warm leads, not cold prospects. These are people who already showed interest in getting their windows tinted or other services done. Your job is to answer questions, handle basic objections, and collect a deposit to lock in their appointment.

What you will do:

Call warm inbound and follow-up leads provided by us daily. Collect a deposit over the phone to confirm the booking. Follow a proven call script we provide. Track your calls and bookings in our CRM.

What we need from you:

Neutral English accent with very clear, easy-to-understand pronunciation. No heavy regional accent. Confident and friendly phone presence. Basic computer and CRM skills. Available during US business hours. Consistent and reliable, this is not a gig, it is a real position.

Pay: Fixed monthly base plus performance bonus per confirmed booking.

Experience: Sales or customer service by phone preferred. Home service or automotive industry experience is a plus but not required.

If you are a strong communicator who can stay on script, handle a few objections, and close a simple low-ticket sale, we want to hear from you.

title: Data Entry Ecommerce Operations Assistant
description:
About Us:



We are a growing U.S.-based e-commerce company. We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable assistant to help with data entry and daily operations. This is a part-time role with flexible hours, with potential to grow into full-time.



Responsibilities:



- Perform accurate data entry and updates in Google Sheets and internal systems

- Track and update product pricing based on supplier cost changes

- Ensure pricing consistency across different sheets/systems and fix mismatches

- Assist with price matching and basic repricing updates when needed

- Maintain product data, including costs (COGS), miscellaneous costs, pricing, and expiry dates

- Perform basic data cleanup and accuracy checks

- Work with product listings and pricing in Amazon Seller Central (required); Walmart/eBay is a plus

- Apply basic understanding of product costs and sourcing logic when updating data (e.g., cost changes, supplier pricing)

- Flag any errors or inconsistencies in data



Working Hours:

- Part-time role (typically 10–20 hours per week) but can get more hours or even be considered for full time down the line.

- Flexible schedule: work can be completed at any time, as long as tasks are finished on time

- More hours may be available at the beginning for training and initial workload, then stabilize over time

- In the beginning, you may be required to align with our existing Philippines-based team for training and coordination

- Regular calls/meetings with the team and CEO are part of the role

- Hours can increase over time based on performance and reliability



TO APPLY – ANSWER ALL QUESTIONS BELOW



1. How many years of experience do you have working with the Amazon wholesale model (or Walmart wholesale)?

2. What were your main responsibilities in your previous role(s)? (Focus on data entry, pricing, or product-related work)

3. How comfortable are you working with Google Sheets / Excel with large datasets and numbers? Please describe the type of work you have done.

4. Have you worked with pricing updates or cost changes before? Briefly explain what you handled.

5. Are you comfortable working with detailed numerical data (costs, pricing, calculations, etc.) on a daily basis?



IMPORTANT: 

1. Applications with unclear or vague answers will not be considered.

2. Please share a link to your resume when applying. 

3. Please read the job description & answer the questions without any AI help to be considered. We're well aware when it's an AI response.



***PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DON"T HAVE AMAZON WHOLESALE EXPERIENCE. IF YOU DO, WE WILL MARK IT AS SPAM AND IT WILL EFFECT YOUR PROFILE WHEN YOU APPLY FOR FUTURE JOBS***

title: Video Editor
description:
SHORT-FORM VIDEO EDITOR (REMOTE)



Who we are:



Luck Management is a fast-growing Creator Management Agency working with high-performing creators across Europe and the US. We operate with a large, structured Marketing & Sales team and manage daily content output at scale for multiple clients.



Who we’re looking for:



We’re hiring an experienced Short-Form Video Editor for a full-time, long-term position, starting ASAP.

Your main job: Cutting RAW creator content into engaging viral short clips for Instagram Reels/TikTok. Think walking videos, Broll, lifestyle content, POV Clips. Nothing overly complicated, but speed, structure and a strong feeling for watchtime optimization & hooks are essential.



If you’ve already edited for creators or personal brands on social media, even better.



What you’ll do:



- Cut RAW footage into high-performing short-form clips (primarily Instagram & TikTok)

- Follow clear style guides, briefings & reference videos

- Handle occasional smaller edits (subtitles, timing tweaks, minor effects)

- Communicate daily with our team



Workload:



- Approx. 6–8 hours per day 

- 6-7 Days a week (Producing in advance is possible)

- We work with a defined number of videos that need to be delivered daily

- Speed and clean output matter



Compensation:



€800 – €1,200/month depending on skill level and output + performance bonuses. The better your work, the more you earn.



Tools



We’ve mostly worked with CapCut/Edit so far. Other editing tools are fine too, as long as the output quality fits.



What we expect



- Experience in video editing is helpful

- Solid understanding of short-form content fundamentals, watchtime & hooks

- Experience with creator content / personal brands is a big plus

- Reliable, responsive and available daily

- Hungry mindset, wants to grow long-term with a team



Process



1.Message us on
 with your introduction, experience & references

2.We review and if there’s potential, we send you a short test cut and Guide  (3–4 videos)

3.Interview Call 

4. If all went successfull, we start the onboarding



What we offer



- Long-term collaboration with stable daily workload

- High Pay

- Creative environment 

- Clear structures, guides & regular feedback

- Working with a professional, international team

- 100% remote



Important



Please do not apply if you’re actively working on many other projects or can’t treat this as a priority. No timewasters.



How to apply



if you think you are a great a fit for our company, please 
 via
, with a nice introduction about yourself and past work experience. 



Please make sure to include the word: "VIRAL" at the very first of your application. If you take this application very seriously - it will change your life for the better- guaranteed - but you have to take it brutally seriously.



Good Luck :)

title: AI Automation & Social Media Marketing Specialist (GoHighLevel + Funnels + Lead Systems)
description:
We are looking for someone who thinks like a marketer and systems builder, not just a virtual assistant.

This role is focused on building systems that generate leads, nurture them, and convert them into clients through automation, AI, social media, and funnel design.



We are not looking for someone who just completes tasks.

We are looking for someone who understands strategy, design, engagement, and conversion.



Important: Read Before Applying

We ARE looking for someone who:

Understands what makes content perform

Knows how to create engagement and conversations

Can design landing pages that convert leads—not just look good

Thinks about results, not just tasks



???? Responsibilities

???? AI Automation & Systems

Build and manage automations inside Go High Level (GHL)

Create lead follow-up systems (SMS,
, pipelines)

Build AI agents / chatbots for lead intake and qualification

Connect tools using Zapier, Make, or native integrations

???? Funnels & Lead Generation

Build landing pages and funnels inside GHL

Optimize pages for conversion (not just design)

Improve lead capture and booking flows

Support campaign launches and offers

???? Social Media Marketing & Content

Create and schedule content (Instagram, TikTok,
)

Develop content ideas based on trends and performance

Design clean, high-converting graphics (Canva or similar)

Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

 Note: We will provide raw video content when needed. Your role will include editing, repurposing, and optimizing that content for engagement and conversions.



???? What Success Looks Like in This Role

Content that:

Gets engagement (likes, comments, shares)

Drives DMs and conversations

Converts viewers into leads

Landing pages that:

Capture attention quickly

Communicate the offer clearly

Convert traffic into leads or booked calls

Automations that:

Follow up with leads instantly

Increase response rates

Move leads through the pipeline

Strong experience with Go High Level (GHL)

title: Lead Generation Specialist-Execura
description:
We’re looking for a Lead Generation Specialist to help us grow our client base at Execura Support Solutions.



About VA Agency Execura:



Execura Support Solutions works with business owners and founders to help them get more clients and streamline their operations so they can focus on scaling instead of getting stuck in day-to-day tasks. 



We’re building a team focused on execution, growth, and real results.



About the Role



This is not just a “send messages” role.



We’re looking for someone who can:



Find and engage the right people (CEOs, founders, business owners)

Start real, natural conversations

Turn those conversations into booked calls



You’ll be working directly with the founder and COO and will play a key role in growing the business.



What You’ll Do

Generate and reach out to qualified leads

Send 50–100 targeted outreach messages daily

Google doc of leads

Follow up with leads consistently

Maintain ongoing conversations with prospects

Move leads toward booking calls via Calendly

Keep lead tracking organized and updated

Requirements

1–3 years experience in lead generation, outreach, or sales

Strong communication skills (clear, natural, not robotic)

Proactive and able to work independently

Comfortable speaking with business owners

Bonus If You Have

Appointment setting or sales experience

Experience with LinkedIn, WhatsApp, or multi-platform outreach

Important



This is a results-driven role. We value:



Conversations started

Leads engaged

Calls booked



Not just activity.



To Apply



Please send your updated resume and tell me more about you and how much are you're looking for. 



We need results!!

Part-time remote role

How to Apply

Qualified applicants will be contacted for an immediate interview via Zoom.

title: Video editor
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive video edtor to support our content and marketing team. 



This role will largely consist of editing short form videos for reels and ads, with opportunities to advance to editing long-form YouTube videos and podcasts. 



The ideal candidate will have excellent skills in video editing software fast response time, attention to detail, proficiency in English, a strong work ethic, and proficiency with various tools and platforms.



Bonus Skills (Preferred, but not required):



Familiarity with frequent flyer programs and loyalty programs for airlines and USA-based credit card companies such as Chase, Amex, Capital One, Citi, BILT, American Airlines, Alaska Airlines, British Airways, Air Canada, Singapore Airlines, Cathay Pacific, Qantas, Virgin Atlantic, Air France, United, Delta, and Southwest Airlines.



Skills and Qualifications:



Fluent in English with strong communication skills (both verbal and written)

Strong organization skills and proficiency with video editing software

Excellent attention to detail and ability to work independently

Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively in a fast-paced environment

A positive, solution-oriented attitude and a willingness to learn new tools and processes



Working Hours/ capacity:



Flexible hours, but requires ability to turnaround video edits in less than 24 hours

Video capacity: approximately 15-30 short form reels per month, with potential to take on more workload based on your performance and capacity

title: Assistant Sales Manager - For U.S. Cleaning Company
description:
Assistant Sales Manager (Remote)– Two Maids of Milwaukee 



Remote | Part-Time (25–30 hrs/week) | Growth Opportunity  



About Us:



Two Maids of Milwaukee is a family-owned residential cleaning company based in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. We offer a full range of home cleaning services — from routine weekly maintenance to thorough top-to-bottom deep cleans. Recently recognized by Inc. Magazine as the nation's fastest growing cleaning company, we're proud of the 
ntum we've built and the culture we've maintained along the way. 



At Two Maids, we believe in putting family first — both for the customers we serve and the team we're building. Our growth creates real opportunities for people who want to be part of something meaningful and take pride in their work. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you. 



The Role:



We're looking for a motivated and personable Assistant Sales Manager to join our team. In this role, you'll be remote and the first point of contact for potential customers — helping them find the right cleaning service and guiding them through the process of becoming a Two Maids client. 



This is a great fit for someone who genuinely enjoys talking with people, stays organized under pressure, and takes ownership of their work without needing to be micromanaged. 



This is not your average sales role. You’ll have a hand in nearly every part of our business — including managing customer support and helping with additional administrative duties in the office. We’re looking for someone who’s excited about taking ownership of day-to-day sales, operations and growing into a leadership role as we scale. 





 

What You'll Be Doing:



Managing inbound leads through our CRM system and ensuring they are placed in the correct action plans 



Calling, texting, and
ing leads to discuss cleaning options and convert them into customers 



Scheduling in-home consultations for prospective clients based on management and ownership schedules 



Keeping the CRM database organized, accurate, and up to date 



Potential creative outlet to create action plans that you feel are better suited for our leads 



Providing excellent customer service to current and prospective clients 



Supporting general office tasks as needed, with room to grow into additional responsibilities over time 



 



What We're Looking For: 



Fluent in American English with strong spoken and written communication skills 



Prior experience in sales and/or customer support 



Comfortable managing CRM systems and lead pipelines 



Confident and personable on the phone — you enjoy talking to people 



Self-motivated and proactive; you thrive working independently in a remote setting 



Detail-oriented, empathetic, patient, and a clear communicator 



Equipped with a reliable computer, strong internet connection, and a quiet home workspace 



 

Compensation & Benefits:



Pay: $8/hour, paid bi-weekly 



Hours: 25–30 hours per week; room to grow into full-time if wanted 



Performance: Potential for pay increases based on performance and growth 



Health Stipend: $25/week toward health insurance and government contributions 



13th Month Pay: Included (prorated in your first year) 



Paid Time Off: 20 paid days off per year (available after 6 months) + 8 U.S. holidays 





How to Apply:



To be considered for this position, please send a one-minute voice recording introducing yourself using Vocaroo and include the link in your application. 



Address your recording directly to Steve — I'm pretty laid back, so feel free to be conversational and let your personality shine through. Strong spoken English is one of the most important parts of this role, and we appreciate your understanding of this requirement. 



Application Deadline: Friday, May 1st 



Two Maids of Milwaukee is a family-owned business that values people, growth, and doing great work. We look forward to meeting you

title: Landing page builder / Funnel page specialist
description:

You will be working inside Shopify, primarily using GemPages (or similar page builders), building pages from provided copy, examples, or references. This role focuses on execution and clean implementation rather than copywriting.



Responsibilities

Create advertorial-style pages (blog/news-style layouts, including graphic designs)



Build listicles and quiz-style funnel pages



Ensure pages are mobile responsive and load efficiently



Implement provided tracking scripts or pixels when needed



Make revisions based on feedback



Keep page structures organized and easy to manage



Requirements



Proven experience building landing pages in Shopify



Experience with GemPages or similar Shopify page builders



Understanding of conversion-focused layouts



Experience building advertorials, listicles, or quiz funnels



Strong attention to layout, spacing, and readability



Ability to follow instructions and meet deadlines



Good communication skills and reliable internet connection



Experience with graphic designing.



Nice to Have



Experience with affiliate marketing or paid ads funnels



Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS within Shopify



Familiarity with tracking tools (Meta Pixel, Google Tag, etc.)



Ability to suggest layout improvements for better conversions



What We Offer



Long-term work for the right candidate



Consistent landing page projects



Clear instructions and provided copy



Flexible working hours



Opportunity for increased responsibility over time



How to Apply



Please include:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience with Shopify and landing page builders



Links or screenshots of Shopify pages you’ve built (advertorials, listicles, quizzes preferred)



The tools you use (GemPages, PageFly, etc.)



Applications without relevant samples may not be considered.

ta ads,
 design, e-commerce product pages, lifestyle imagery, mockups and more — all within Figma + other apps if necessary.

mbers (4 in Denmark and 2 in the Philippines), where collaboration is fun, fast, and feedback-driven. Our Philippine-based teammates have been with us for nearly 2 years and continue to thrive in our supportive and ambitious work environment.



What We Offer



Weekly or bi-weekly pay



Long-term, full-time role (we want you to grow with us)

title: Podcast Manager (Remote) NOT A VIDEO EDITOR
description:
Podcast Manager (Remote – Philippines)



Full-Time – $1,100 USD/month

40 hours/week | Long-term | Opportunity for pay increase after 90 days



About the Role



We’re hiring a Podcast Manager to help us rapidly grow our clients podcasts. This is a remote, full-time role based in the Philippines. You’ll be in charge of booking guests, managing content, and running all social media channels for the show.



We’re looking for someone who’s organized, proactive, creative, and excited to be a key part of a podcast that’s about to take off.





Responsibilities



Guest Booking + Scheduling

 • Research potential guests (Founders, CEOs, etc.)

 • Send outbound messages to invite guests (via
, LinkedIn, or Instagram)

 • Manage the scheduling calendar and coordinate guest bookings



Clip Curation + Team Management

 • Watch full podcast episodes to identify the most engaging clips (15–90 seconds)

 • Write clear clip notes and send to our editing team

 • Review final edits for quality and request revisions if needed



Social Media Management

 • Own and grow all Founder Talk social accounts (YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Instagram)

 • Write short, compelling captions that match our brand voice

 • Schedule and post content 5–6 days/week across platforms

 • Track performance and flag best-performing content



Requirements

 • Excellent written and spoken English

 • Highly organized and detail-oriented

 • Experience managing social media accounts (personal or professional)

 • Familiarity with podcast formats, short-form content, and YouTube

 • Able to identify what makes a video hooky and engaging

 • Comfortable using tools like Google Calendar, Trello, Notion, etc.

 • Bonus if you’ve worked with content creators or podcast teams before



What You Get

 • $1,100 USD/month to start (with performance-based increases after 90 days)

 • Stable, long-term opportunity with a growing U.S.-based brand

 • Creative freedom to help shape the future of a high-potential podcast

 • Work with a friendly, supportive team that values impact and ownership

 • Clear systems, structure, and training to help you succeed



How to Apply



Reply to this job posting and I will get back to all qualified candidates within the next 72 hours. Please include: 

 1. A short paragraph on why you’re a great fit

 2. Examples of PODCASTS/social media accounts or content you’ve helped manage

 3. Your resume

 4. A 60-second Loom video introducing yourself (optional but preferred and this will get you to the top of the list asap)



Excited to talk to you! 



-Alex

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Monday through Saturday. Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 9:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500 per month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory and must be completed within 7 days. This deadline is non-negotiable. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one. If onboarding is not completed within 7 days we will not be moving forward.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




  



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.

title: Operations Manager - (Pathway to Director of Operations)
description:
About the Company 

Nelson Finance Life LLC (NFL) is a U.S.-based financial consulting and government compliance firm focused on helping businesses navigate complex regulations while building long-term financial stability. We operate in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment and are building systems to scale across compliance consulting, financial services, and government contracting.



About the Role

The CEO will be transitioning into law school in August 2026. This role is critical in helping the company scale by taking ownership of day-to-day operations and building systems that allow the business to run efficiently without constant oversight. This is not a support role. This is a leadership role for someone who wants to grow into a Director of Operations. and take ownership of execution. You will act as the operational bridge between the CEO and the team, ensuring all work is executed efficiently without requiring constant CEO involvement.



Responsibilities

- Manage daily operations and workflows across compliance, proposals, and internal operations.

- Build and document SOPs across all core business functions.

- Implement systems using tools like 
, Google Workspace, and automation platforms.

- Track deadlines, deliverables, and ensure all work is completed on time.

- Run weekly team check-ins and manage remote staff performance.

- Support proposal and revenue pipeline tracking (RFP/RFQ coordination) 

- Hire and manage interns or support staff 

- Create weekly reports and KPI dashboards for the CEO

- Ownership Expectations (Non-Negotiable)

- You are expected to take ownership of tasks and outcomes, not wait for instructions. 

- You proactively identify problems and present solutions. 

- You communicate clearly and early—no silence or delays. 

- You are comfortable making decisions with limited direction



Who You Are 

- Degree preferred but not required. A business or operations background is a plus.

- Experience in operations, startups, or remote team management 

- 5–7+ years in operations, business management, or startup scaling.

- Experience building systems, processes, and team infrastructure with limited oversight

- Strong organizational, communication, and leadership skills.

- Entrepreneurial mindset with the ability to work autonomously.

- Experience with government contracting, compliance, or consulting (preferred).



Work Environment:

- Must be available and responsive during EST working hours (8:00 AM – 1:00 PM EST)

- Fully remote (Philippines-based) 

- Must have reliable internet and dual-monitor setup 

- 6-month probationary period 

- Collaborative, fast-paced, and growth-focused environment



Tech Stack 


, Google Workspace, Slack, QuickBooks, Zapier, Hubstaff, Zoom, ChatGPT, Microsoft Office



Compensation & Growth

- Base: $750/month (25 hours/week) 

- Performance-based bonuses (accuracy, timeliness, execution) 

- Additional bonuses tied to contracts and proposals won 

- Opportunity for a salary increase after 90 days based on performance 

- Clear pathway to Director of Operations with increased compensation and responsibility



Application Instructions

This Role Is NOT For You If:

- You wait for instructions instead of taking initiative.

- You struggle with deadlines or follow-through 

- You prefer constant supervision.

- You avoid problem-solving.



To apply, include the word “NFL OPERATOR” in your application subject line and answer the following questions. Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.



- What would you do if you were given a task you did not fully understand? 

- How do you prioritize tasks when everything feels urgent?

- Describe a system or process you built from scratch.

title: Senior Direct Response Video Editor - $2,000-$2,500/mo + Performance Bonuses (Multi 8-Figure DTC Brand)
description:
We're not looking for a video editor.



We're looking for someone who makes people FEEL something in the first 3 seconds of a video. Someone who understands that pacing IS the ad. That silence IS a tool. That the difference between a $20CPA and a $100 CPA is the editor, not the script.



We just proved that with our own data. Same script. Same voiceover. Same everything. Two different editors. One produced a 50% hook rate and $21 cost per acquisition. The other produced $100 CPA on the same words. The editor is the variable. That's why this hire matters more than any other hire we're making right now.



ABOUT US:

We're a multi 8-figure DTC supplement brand based in the US, scaling aggressively on Meta. Our creative team writes scripts that score in the top 1% of direct response copy. We have the words. We need someone who can turn those words into ads that print money.



We're not a startup hoping to figure it out. We have winning ads. We have proven data. We have a creative team with a strategist, copywriters, and a graphic designer. What we need is an editor who can match the energy of what's already winning and help us produce more of it, faster.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

- Editing 2-3 direct response video ads per day (60-120 seconds each)

- Working with AI voiceovers, AI avatars, UGC footage, and B-roll

- Following detailed editor briefs with timestamps, pacing direction, and emotional peak markers

- Studying our winning ads and replicating the exact pacing, energy, and editing style

- Finding and sourcing realistic B-roll from TikTok and AI tools (no generic stock footage)

- Working directly with our creative strategist and copywriter

- QA-ing every frame — if there's a spelling mistake, a bad clip, or the pacing feels off, YOU catch it before it goes live



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU:

- You understand PACING. Not just cuts. You know when to slow down, when to speed up, when to hold a shot, when to let silence do the work.

- You understand STORYTELLING. Every visual supports the voiceover. Every clip change has a reason. Nothing is random.

- You understand EMOTION. You can watch a reference video and feel what makes it work, not just see the techniques.

- You can clone AI voiceovers and avatars using tools like HeyGen, Higgsfield, ElevenLabs.

- You're proficient in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or CapCut Pro.

- You've edited direct response or performance ads before (Meta, TikTok, YouTube). This is NOT a YouTube vlog or wedding video role.



WHAT WE DON'T WANT:

- Someone who waits to be told every move. We give you a brief and reference videos. You bring the creative vision.

- Someone who just assembles clips. That's a VA, not an editor.

- Someone who over-edits. Our best ads are raw, real, and minimal. Not flashy.

- Someone who can't take feedback. We push hard because the standard is high. If you take feedback personally instead of using it to get better, this isn't the role for you.



COMPENSATION:

- Base: $2,000 - $2,500 USD/month (based on experience)

- Performance bonuses up to $5,000/month based on ad performance (ad spend thresholds + ROAS targets)

- Your income has no ceiling here. If your videos produce winners, you make more money. Period.

- Compensation review every 4 months with potential 15-25% increases



WHY THIS IS DIFFERENT FROM EVERY OTHER VIDEO EDITOR JOB:

- You're not editing content for a small brand hoping to grow. You're editing for a brand that's already spending serious money on ads and needs MORE winning creative.

- You work directly with a creative strategist who provides detailed briefs with emotional direction, not just "make it look nice."

- Your videos go live within days and you can see the RESULTS of your work in real time. Hook rates. Hold rates. CPA. You get direct feedback from the ad account on whether your edit worked.

- This is a career, not a gig. We're building a team for the long term and the right editor becomes one of the most important people in this company.



HOW TO APPLY:

Do NOT send a resume. We don't care about your resume.



Send us:

1. A 3-5 minute Loom video walking us through your 2-3 best video ad edits. Show us the video. Tell us WHY you made the editing choices you made. What was the pacing strategy? Where did you slow down and why? What was the hardest part? We want to hear you THINK about editing, not just show us pretty videos.

2. Links to 2-3 of your best performing video ads (with metrics if possible).

3. One sentence answering this question: What's the difference between a good video editor and a great one?



If your Loom is strong, we'll send you a paid test - one of our scripts, our reference videos, and 48 hours to produce it. That's the real audition.



We review every application. If you're the right person, you'll hear from us within 24 hours of submitting.



This role starts immediately.

title: Podcast Video Editor
description:
Full-Time Podcast Video Editor (Long-Form + Shorts) - Premium Quality, Hiring This Week



I'm launching a personal podcast on AI, entrepreneurship and life in Bali, and I'm hiring a full-time video editor to own the entire podcast edit pipeline, long-form episodes plus short-form cutdowns for Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube and TikTok. Looking to hire in the next few days so move fast.



The work:

Editing raw multi-cam podcast footage into polished long-form episodes (multi-speaker face cuts, clean audio mixing, beautiful colour grading). The visual benchmark is Chris Williamson's Modern Wisdom, premium, cinematic, warm. The intro style I want is Diary of a CEO, captivating hook, fast-paced cold open, cinematic title card. From each episode you'll also cut 5-10 short-form clips for Reels, Shorts and LinkedIn with quality captions, hook-first structure, and zero filler.

Most important: turnaround speed.



I already have 10 episodes filmed and need at least 1 long-form episode edited and delivered per day for the first week, then 10 more episodes by the end of the month. This is non-negotiable. To hit that pace you need to know how to use AI tools and Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve plugins to speed up the workflow (auto-transcription, auto-captions, silence removal, multi-cam sync, AI colour matching, etc). If you're still editing the old manual way, this role isn't for you.

If the long-form plus short-form workload is too much for one person, I'm open to hiring two editors, one for long-form and one for short-form. Long-form is the priority right now.



Technical requirements:

I work with large raw files, sometimes up to 100GB per episode, so you need fast, reliable internet for downloads and uploads. You also need a machine that can handle 4K multi-cam edits without crashing.

To apply,
 me at 
 with the word PODCAST in the subject line. Any application without PODCAST in the subject will be ignored, this is the first filter.



In your
 please include:



Your portfolio link, specifically any podcast long-form and short-form edits you've done before

The AI tools and plugins you currently use to speed up your edits

Your internet speed (download and upload)

Your computer specs

Whether you're applying for long-form, short-form, or both

Your availability to start this week



If you're ready to go,
 me asap. Shortlisted editors will go straight into a paid test edit on a real episode clip, then a paid trial week, then a full-time role with potential to grow long-term as I scale across multiple shows and brands.

Looking forward to seeing your work.

Alex

title: Remote Interior Designer Assistant
description:
REMOTE INTERIOR DESIGNER ASSISTANT

7 Leaves Cafe | Remote | Full-Time

Working Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (Monday–Friday)



ABOUT 7 LEAVES CAFE

7 Leaves Cafe is a fast-growing California-based cafe brand with 40+ store locations. Our Store Development team designs and builds spaces that embody our brand — warm, welcoming, and intentional. As we expand our footprint, we are looking for a talented Interior Designer Assistant to support our team with day-to-day design work and help bring new locations to life.



ABOUT THE ROLE

The Remote Interior Designer Assistant works alongside our Store Development team to support the planning, design, and execution of interior spaces across all 7 Leaves Cafe locations. You will assist with design concepts, documentation, vendor coordination, and ensuring that every store reflects our brand standards and operational needs.



This is a fully remote, full-time role. You will be expected to work 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST) and communicate closely with our U.S.-based team.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

• Develop interior design concepts, sketches, 3D renderings, mood boards, and visual aids for leadership review

• Assist in planning store layouts, furniture placement, finish selections, and decorative elements

• Prepare CAD floor plans, elevations, and design documentation

• Support material selection, procurement coordination, and budget tracking

• Collaborate with vendors, contractors, and internal teams to ensure design intent is executed correctly

• Review completed projects and recommend solutions for design-related concerns

• Stay current with hospitality and retail design trends

• Support multiple projects simultaneously with organized documentation and on-time delivery

• Ensure all designs comply with ADA requirements and applicable building codes



QUALIFICATIONS

• Bachelor's degree or diploma in Interior Design, Architecture, or a related field

• Minimum 3+ years of relevant interior design experience (hospitality, retail, or commercial preferred)

• Proficiency in CAD software (AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, or equivalent)

• Experience with 3D rendering tools and mood board creation

• Familiarity with Adobe Creative Suite or similar design tools

• Knowledge of ADA requirements and building codes related to interior design

• Strong visual communication skills — able to present design concepts clearly

• Detail-oriented with excellent organizational and time management skills

• Comfortable working independently in a remote setting

• Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Suite

• Able to work 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST reliably (required)

• Experience with AI design tools (Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, or similar) is a plus



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We are looking for someone who is proactive, visually minded, and able to manage multiple projects without losing attention to detail. You should be comfortable communicating asynchronously, asking clarifying questions, and flagging concerns early. You will work closely with our Senior Interior Designer Coordinator and Store Development team — responsiveness and collaboration are key.



HOW TO APPLY

Submit your application with the following:

1. Updated resume / CV

2. Portfolio (PDF or link) — include at least 2–3 commercial or hospitality design samples

3. Brief cover note (3–5 sentences) on your relevant experience and why you're a fit for this role



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



7 Leaves Cafe is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all tea
mbers.

title: Remote Staff Accountant - Vacation Rental
description:
Maui Paradise Properties is a locally owned, full?service real estate and vacation rental company on Maui, specializing in managing premium homes and condos and providing high?touch service to owners and guests. We are seeking a **remote** Staff Accountant with vacation rental or property management experience to support our growing portfolio and accounting team.



Position overview



- Title: Staff Accountant – Vacation Rentals (Remote)  

- Schedule: Full?time, Monday–Friday (Hawaii business hours overlap required)  

- Location: Remote (preference for candidates with experience supporting US?based companies)  

- Reports to: Controller and Accounting Manager



The Staff Accountant is responsible for day?to?day accounting for vacation rental properties, including owner and property level activity, reconciliations, and monthly reporting.



Key responsibilities



- Record and reconcile daily financial transactions for multiple vacation rental properties, including rental income, fees, taxes, and operating expenses.  

- Process and code vendor invoices, credit card charges, and reimbursements; ensure accurate GL coding by property, unit, and department.  

- Perform monthly bank reconciliations and balance?sheet reconciliations (cash, deposits, prepaid, accruals, intercompany accounts).  

- Assist with owner accounting, including tracking owner statements, owner charges/credits, and preparation of owner reports and support schedules.  

- Support month?end close by preparing journal entries, accruals, and variance explanations for vacation rental operations.  

- Help maintain an orderly and complete digital filing system for invoices, reconciliations, and supporting documentation in line with internal controls.  

- Respond to internal questions from operations, reservations, and owner relations teams regarding accounting entries, balances, and reports.  

- Assist with preparation of schedules for external CPA, auditors, and tax filings as needed.  



Qualifications



- 2+ years of accounting experience, ideally in vacation rentals, hotels, property management, or hospitality.  

- Solid understanding of debits/credits, reconciliations, and month?end close processes.  

- Experience working with property?based or multi?entity accounting (tracking income and expenses by property/unit).  

- Proficiency with accounting software and spreadsheets (e.g., QuickBooks Online and Excel/Google Sheets).  

- Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and ability to follow documented processes in a remote environment.  

- Clear written and verbal communication skills in English and comfort working with a distributed team across time zones.  



Remote work expectations



- Reliable high?speed internet, computer, and quiet workspace suitable for accounting work and online meetings.  

- Consistent availability during agreed?upon hours overlapping with Hawaii time for collaboration, handoffs, and training.  

- Ability to work independently, manage priorities across multiple properties, and meet daily and monthly deadlines.



How to apply



Please reply to this ad and attach your resume.



Compensation:

-$6/hrs, $7/hrs after 3 months probation

-13th month pay

-2 weeks paid vacation after 1 year

-$100 per month medicare allowance

-3-5% COLA

title: Customer Support & Ecommerce Operations Assistant (Shopify / Full-Time / US Hours Overlap)
description:
Customer Support & Ecommerce Operations Assistant

Full-Time Remote Position



About Tradlands

We create essentials women’s clothing — like sweaters, dresses, t-shirts, jumpsuits, pants, and jackets — in small, responsibly made batches. Each new product, like our business, is developed slowly and thoughtfully, with respect for the people we work with and our customers.



We carefully engineer each detail — from the fit to the fabric to the trims — and refine your favorites every year. Timeless, well-made essentials that redefine the meaning of effortless style.



Clothing shouldn't be stressful. Getting dressed shouldn't cause anxiety. But every woman knows those feelings.

Our goal is to create clothing that honors our customers, gives them confidence, creates a canvas for their personal style, and allows them to move through their day with ease — so they can focus on the things that matter most to them.



About Our Team

Tradlands is a small remote team. We are focused on creating customer happiness through our products, as well as our interactions and conversations. We use this as a litmus test for all of our actions and resulting procedures.



Excellent communication is the key to clarity. We believe in systems and processes that are effective, efficient, and repeatable. Systems and processes provide a simple, direct path to completing tasks, projects, and our overall mission.



Our systems and processes are intended to be clear and precise enough they can be performed easily by a new tea
mber with minimal yet sufficient training.



About Our Customer Service

Tradlands is a customer-centric company and we understand customers are the reason we exist as a company and why we get to do what we love every day.



We go out of our way to satisfy and delight our customers and exceed their expectations whenever possible. In return we hope our customers go out of their way to spread the word about Tradlands.



Working with our company should always be easy. We help everybody who reaches out to us with a positive attitude and a helpful reply, no matter how big or small the request.



We use good judgment in all situations and aim to always do the right thing for our customers and our team.



About You

You are a customer-facing professional with a real interest in helping customers. While direct customer experience with a women’s DTC apparel brand is not required, you are someone who has worked in hospitality, retail, professional services, or any other role that involves direct communication with and the support of customers.



You are a natural problem solver. You can always depend on your creativity and resourcefulness to get the job done and nurture happy customers while doing it.



You have a roll-up-your-sleeves, get-it-done personality with a friendly and professional attitude.



You are detail-oriented and meticulous in your work.



You are comfortable managing your own workload while working remotely.



Hard Skills

Technically savvy. This role requires you to work across multiple software applications to support both customers and operations.



Experience with tools such as:

Shopify

Customer support inbox platforms (CommsLayer or similar)

Returns platforms such as WeSupply

Google Workspace

Spreadsheets and documentation tools



Clear, personable communication and excellent writing skills are essential since you will be responding directly to customers.



You are comfortable working with documentation and tracking information such as shipment logs, payment schedules, and internal operational documents.



Soft Skills

You have strong listening skills and emotional intelligence.



You remain calm and professional in difficult situations and can help turn a negative experience into a positive one.



You understand the importance of your role in supporting both customers and the broader operations of the company.



Nice To Have

Interest in women’s apparel and ability to help customers with sizing and product questions.



Experience working with ecommerce brands.



Experience supporting operational workflows such as supplier shipments or inventory coordination.



Specific Tasks

Build and maintain real, high-quality relationships with our customers.



Answer pre- and post-purchase customer inquiries efficiently and professionally through our inbox platform (Commslayer).



Process returns, exchanges, and order edits through Shopify and our returns platform (WeSupply).



Assist customers with sizing guidance, product information, and order questions.



Coordinate with our 3PL fulfillment partner to resolve order issues and shipment questions.



Assist with operational coordination tasks including tracking inbound supplier shipments and updating internal documentation as inventory moves from international suppliers to our U.S. warehouse.



Support supplier and vendor payment tracking by maintaining payment schedules, monitoring due dates, and assisting with preparing wire transfers when required.



Monitor and manage returns workflows inside our returns platform (WeSupply).



Maintain accurate internal documentation related to supplier shipments, payments, and operational workflows.



Attend tea
etings and communicate clearly with tea
mbers regarding customer issues and operational updates.



Bring new ideas and improvements to customer service and operational workflows.



Compose weekly or monthly summaries and KPI reports when requested.



Build and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) for your areas of responsibility.



Become highly knowledgeable about our products and proactively help customers choose the right items.



A Typical Day Might Include

Answering customer
s through CommsLayer.



Processing returns and exchanges through WeSupply.



Editing or updating customer orders in Shopify.



Coordinating with our warehouse partner to resolve order issues.



Updating shipment tracking information for incoming supplier shipments.



Updating internal spreadsheets or documentation related to shipments or payments.



Communicating with the team about customer issues or operational updates.



Benefits

Full training will be provided so you can learn our systems, products, and processes.



All Philippine holidays are paid time off.



Employees receive 40 hours of paid time off (PTO) per year, with up to 5 unused hours allowed to roll over into the following year.



You will gain experience working with a small ecommerce team and modern ecommerce tools.



Remote Work

This role is full-time at 40 hours per week.



This is a fully remote contract position.



Candidates must be available Monday through Friday.



This role requires daily overlap with U.S. Eastern Time, typically 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM Eastern, in order to respond to customer inquiries and coordinate with the team.



This role is best suited for someone looking for a long-term full-time position with a stable schedule rather than short-term freelance work.



We rely heavily on collaborative tools including 
, Google Workspace, and Asana.



You will be responsible for furnishing your own computer.



You must have dependable high-speed internet access.



Application Instructions

Applications that do not follow this instruction may not be reviewed.



Apply here:

title: Video Editor Needed - Short-Form Content (TikTok/Instagram Reels)
description:
Video Editor Needed - Short-Form Content (TikTok/Instagram Reels)



Budget: $150/month (consistent, long-term work)



I run a crypto/finance content brand with 230K+ followers across platforms. I need a video editor who can recreate viral short-form videos (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts) for my accounts.



Here’s the exact workflow:

Research -  Do daily research for 10 viral videos to recreate, I will send you examples so you know exactly what to look for



Text Overlays - Watch the original video and copy the text overlays word for word. Write them down and place them into the recreated video with clean formatting and timing.



Sounds & Music - Find the original sound on TikTok and add it into CapCut. If you can’t find the sound, screen record the original video, import it into CapCut, and extract the audio from the screen recording. Over time you’ll build a library of sounds and this gets faster.



Editing & Delivery - Recreate the video using the clips I provide, the copied text, and the sound. Match the pacing, transitions, and energy of the original. Export in vertical format (9:16) optimized for TikTok/Reels/Shorts. Deliver consistently on schedule.



What I’m Looking For - Experience editing short-form vertical content (TikTok, Reels, Shorts). Comfortable using CapCut or similar editing software. Good eye for trending formats, text placement, and timing. Fast turnaround and reliable communication. Understanding crypto/finance content is a plus but not required.



How To Apply - Send me a
 message 
 with a short intro about yourself and your editing experience, and your 3 best edited videos (short-form, vertical format preferred).If your work is solid, we start immediately.



This is ongoing monthly work with room to grow as the brand scales.

description:
