title: Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer
description:
Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer







Remote-Based  |  Occasional Travel Required  |  Part-Time / Contract





About Our Company :



We are the leading Coding and Robotics Education Academy in Singapore. Our passion and mission is in teaching the children of today, the skills of tomorrow, and have fun learning it !



About the Role : 



We are seeking a passionate and experienced Coding & Robotics Education Trainer to support our growing network of licensees. The successful candidate will be responsible for training our licensee partners who have adopted our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are well-equipped to deliver high-quality STEM education programs.



This role is primarily remote-based, with occasional travel required for training sessions, workshops, or partner support.



You will empower our licensees with the knowledge, skills, and confidence to deliver our coding and robotics curriculum effectively to children aged 5 to 14 years old. You will also play a key role in keeping our curriculum fresh, relevant, and engaging by updating existing materials and developing new content as our programmes evolve.



Key Responsibilities :



•	Train and onboard new licensees on our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are equipped to deliver high-quality lessons.

•	Conduct training workshops and sessions for licensee educators, both virtually and in-person as required.

•	Provide ongoing coaching, mentoring, and support to licensees post-training.

•	Evaluate licensee competency and readiness to deliver the curriculum independently.

•	Review, update, and improve existing curriculum materials to ensure they remain current and effective.

•	Develop new curriculum modules and lesson plans aligned with industry trends and educational best practices.

•	Collaborate with the curriculum and product teams to align training delivery with programme goals.

•	Gather feedback from licensees and learners to continuously improve training programmes.

•	Maintain comprehensive training documentation, guides, and resources.

•	Travel occasionally to licensee locations for in-person training, support, and quality assurance.



Who We Are Looking For :



We are seeking someone who combines a love for education technology with real-world teaching experience. The ideal candidate:

•	Has proven experience training adults in a professional or educational setting.

•	Has hands-on experience teaching or working with children between the ages of 5 and 14 years old.

•	Holds a background in coding, robotics, STEM education, or a closely related field.

•	Is comfortable using and teaching tools such as Scratch, Python, block-based coding platforms, or robotics kits (e.g., LEGO Mindstorms, mBot, or similar).

•	Demonstrates strong curriculum development and instructional design skills.

•	Is an excellent communicator — able to simplify complex technical concepts for varied audiences.

•	Is self-driven, organised, and able to work independently in a remote environment.

•	Is flexible and willing to travel when required.



Qualifications & Experience :



•	Diploma or Degree in Education, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.

•	Minimum 2 years of teaching or training experience — experience with both children and adults is strongly preferred.

•	Current or former school teachers specialising in Computing, ICT, STEM, or related subjects are warmly encouraged to apply.

•	Experience in curriculum writing, lesson planning, or instructional design is a strong advantage.

•	Experience in a franchising or licensee-based education business is a bonus, but not required.

•	Proficiency in digital tools for remote training delivery (e.g., Zoom, Google Meet, LMS platforms).



What We Offer :



•	Flexible, remote-based working arrangement.

•	A meaningful role shaping the next generation of coders and innovators.

•	A collaborative and supportive team environment.

•	Opportunities for professional development and growth within the organisation.

•	Travel allowances for required in-person training engagements.

•	Competitive remuneration commensurate with experience.

title: Corporate Sales Manager – Real Estate Solutions
description:
Job Position is BASED IN SINGAPORE




.sg



Full job description : 



Start Something Purposeful. 



At Urban Space Group , we believe in creating concepts that allow people, business and purpose to come together and thrive. We’re a privately owned real estate group dedicated to real estate concepts for industrial and commercial spaces. We are both owners of industrial properties, commercial shophouses and spaces, as well as operators of business models and concepts such as urbanspace self storage, Urbanpod workspace etc. 



We actively invest to expand our asset portfolio and grow our industrial and shophouse asset management capabilities and offerings.  



We’re looking for a Business Development and Sales Manager to bring our asset investment and management services to our clients, partners and stakeholders. 



Why Join Acuvest :



Your Mission :



To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork. 



This is a full-stack business development and sales role with plenty of room to use your skillsets in sales, strategy, innovation and execution. You’ll lead a motivated team and collaborate closely with other departments. You will report to the Business Development / Sales Director and play a critical role in the company’s performance. 



Why Join us :



- Mentored by management of a company with decades of experience in investment management, property management, development, and self-storage solutions across Singapore and the region. We combine strategic insight with innovation, offering real opportunities to grow and make an impact across a diversified real estate portfolio.



- Build an Elite Network: Connect directly with a high-value network of Corporate and SME business leaders / decision-makers, building a powerful network for your long-term career success. 



- Thrive in a High-Growth Self-Storage Sector. Our self-storage business, Co-working business space, E-commerce fulfilment hubs, serve both individual and corporate clients with flexible space solutions in a fast-rising market. You’ll be at the forefront of lead generation, networking, and deal closing—driving measurable results in an expanding industry.



- Collaborative Culture. Real Career Progression. Work with experienced professionals across property and investment teams, gain exposure to full deal cycles, build strong client relationships, and accelerate your career in sales and business development at Acuvest.



Full job description : What you will be doing



Property Leasing : 



- Develop and implement leasing strategies and initiatives to maximize occupancy, rental income, and tenant satisfaction 



- Identify leasing opportunities and prospective tenants that align with the positioning and target market of each property, and develop relationships with tenants and prospective tenants. 



- Negotiate lease agreements, including terms and conditions, rental rates, lease incentives, and lease renewals, and ensure compliance with company policies and industry standards. 



- Collaborate with property management teams to conduct market research and analysis, assess competitive landscape, and identify trends and opportunities in the property market. 



- Develop and maintain leasing budgets, forecasts, and reports, and track leasing activity, occupancy rates, and financial performance against targets and benchmarks. 



- Manage tenant relations and communication, including addressing tenant inquiries, resolving disputes, and ensuring tenant compliance with lease terms and property rules and regulations. 



- Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote our properties and attract potential tenants and partners. 



Self storage and Co working space sales : 



- Work closely self storage sales team and management on drive the sales and occupancy of our self storage business. 

Enjoy interacting with customers, drive Sales, customer service and relationship management. 



- Actively manage customer enquiries through telephone,
 and messaging applications 



- Providing sales service & consultation to all potential customers 



- Working with Team to formulate marketing promotions and collateral 



- Building relationship with Co-working space, Self Storage and E-commence fulfilment centre customers. 





Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners. 



- Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. 



- An eagerness to learn and grow through hard work and dedication

title: Sales Admin Support
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW



Fintonia Group is seeking a Senior Sales Admin & AI Operations Support professional to serve as the operational backbone of its sales and client engagement functions. This is not a conventional administrative role: the individual will be responsible for maintaining rigorous sales operations while independently building and managing AI-powered workflows that enhance team productivity, client responsiveness, and process quality. A non-negotiable attribute for this role is an exceptional standard of accuracy — the work product this person owns directly reflects on the firm's credibility with clients and counterparties.



The successful candidate will bring a combination of structured administrative discipline and a strong command of modern AI automation tools. Reporting directly to the Head of Sales, this person will work across sales, compliance, and operations to ensure that client onboarding and engagement workflows operate to institutional standards.



At a firm that sits at the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets, the ability to translate operational complexity into streamlined, technology-enabled processes will be a direct contribution to commercial outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

Client Onboarding & Documentation

Own the full client onboarding lifecycle — from intake through KYC/AML documentation, compliance review, and account activation — ensuring every file is complete, accurate, and audit-ready before submission.

Prepare and coordinate all onboarding documentation including subscription agreements, client questionnaires, and regulatory forms, working closely with the compliance and operations teams to meet applicable standards.

Proactively track onboarding status for all active clients, following up on outstanding items and escalating blockers to avoid delays in the activation timeline.

Maintain a structured, version-controlled onboarding repository that can withstand internal or regulatory audit at any point.



Client Relationship Support

Serve as the first point of contact for client enquiries, providing timely, professional responses and managing expectations on resolution timelines.

Coordinate all client-facing logistics — meetings, product demonstrations, webinars, and review calls — ensuring preparation materials, agendas, and follow-up notes are managed without requiring senior tea
mbers to chase.

Maintain accurate, current client records in the CRM; flag data anomalies, contact changes, or missing information proactively rather than reactively.

Support the relationship management team in preparing client update materials, periodic reports, and tailored communications.



Sales & Administrative Support

Support the sales team with scheduling, calendar management, CRM maintenance, and preparation of pitch materials and proposals.

Maintain internal trackers and action logs for client interactions, onboarding milestones, and sales pipeline activity.

Identify and flag opportunities to streamline administrative workflows using available technology tools.



Requirements:

3–5 years of experience in client onboarding, client servicing, or relationship support within financial services, fintech, or asset management

Hands-on experience managing KYC/AML documentation and compliance-driven onboarding processes end-to-end — not just assisting

Strong proficiency in CRM systems (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot) and Microsoft Office / Google Workspace

Excellent written English communication skills; able to draft professional client-facing correspondence independently and accurately

Structured, detail-oriented approach to documentation management with a track record of maintaining audit-ready files

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple concurrent client onboarding workflows without supervision

Comfortable working remotely and independently, aligned to Singapore / KL business hours (SGT/MYT)

Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, or a related field



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Work Hours: Aligned with Singapore Time Zone (SGT), Monday to Friday



Please apply through this link -

ONLY applicants who upload CV via the link will be considered. Thanks!

description:

title: LinkedIn Writer
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a sharp, creative LinkedIn Content Writer who can build a powerful personal or brand presence on LinkedIn, one that stops the scroll, earns trust, and drives real engagement. This isn't a copy-paste content mill role. You'll be crafting 5 high-quality posts per week that combine authoritative writing with visually compelling, data-driven infographics and model-style graphic design.



What You'll Do

You'll write and publish 5 LinkedIn posts daily, each crafted to educate, provoke thought, or inspire action within a specific niche. Every post must feel like it came from a credible expert, not a content scheduler. Alongside your writing, you'll design or direct infographics, carousel frameworks, and model-style visual breakdowns. Think clean hierarchy, bold typography, and data visualization that makes complex ideas instantly digestible.



You'll research trending topics and industry conversations to stay ahead of the curve, develop a consistent voice and editorial calendar, A/B test hooks and formats, and analyze post performance to continuously refine the content strategy.



What We're Looking For

You have at least 2 years of experience writing professional content for LinkedIn, with a portfolio that proves you can drive engagement, not just impressions. You understand what makes a LinkedIn hook work in the first three lines, and you know how to structure a post for maximum dwell time and comments.



On the design side, you're comfortable in Canva, Figma, or Adobe Express and can produce infographics that look like they belong on a top-tier thought leader's feed. You have a strong eye for layout, color, and information hierarchy. Bonus points if you've grown a LinkedIn account from scratch or ghostwritten for executives or founders.



Non-Negotiables

Consistency is everything here: 5 posts per week, every week, on schedule. Each piece of content must be original, well-researched, and free of generic filler. You take ownership of results and aren't waiting to be managed.



Compensation

Competitive, based on experience. Performance bonuses tied to engagement growth and follower milestones.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM Specialist
description:
We are a real estate agency looking for a hands-on GHL CRM Specialist to own our lead conversion system end-to-end. You will build, manage, and optimise our GoHighLevel setup to ensure every lead, from
, and Google, is captured, nurtured, and converted efficiently. You will work closely with our agents to make sure they spend time closing deals, not chasing leads manually.



Key Responsibilities

CRM & Pipeline Management

Build and maintain GHL pipelines that reflect the property transaction lifecycle (inquiry ? viewing ? OTP ? close)

Segment and tag leads by intent, timeline, citizenship status, and property type

Ensure clean, accurate contact data across all lead sources



Workflow & Automation

Design and deploy automated nurture sequences via WhatsApp, SMS, and

Configure behaviour-based triggers (link clicks, page visits, form submissions) to personalise follow-up timing

Build lead scoring logic to prioritise hot leads for agents

Set up appointment reminder workflows and post-viewing follow-up sequences



Lead Source Integration

Connect and maintain integrations with PropertyGuru, 99.co,
 Lead Ads, Google Ads, and other portals via Zapier or webhooks

Ensure zero lead leakage across all channels



Agent Enablement

Train agents on how to use GHL's mobile app, conversations inbox, and task management

Create WhatsApp and SMS message templates that are value-driven and PDPA-compliant

Build dashboards so agents can track their pipeline at a glance



Reporting & Optimisation

Monitor key metrics: speed-to-first-contact, lead-to-viewing rate, viewing-to-OTP rate, and campaign ROI

Run A/B tests on message templates, timing, and sequences

Provide weekly performance reports to management





Requirements

Minimum 2 years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience (mandatory)

Strong understanding of marketing automation, CRM best practices, and funnel design

Familiarity with real estate market 

Experience integrating lead sources via Zapier, Make, or direct webhooks

Working knowledge of WhatsApp Business API setup and compliance

Understanding of Singapore's PDPA requirements for marketing communications

Proficient in crafting messaging that is consultative, not pushy



Nice to Have

Experience with
/Google Ads campaign management

Basic HTML/CSS for
 template customisation

Prior work with property agencies in Singapore



What Success Looks Like in 90 Days

All lead sources connected and flowing into GHL with zero manual data entry

Automated nurture sequences live for Hot, Warm, and Cold lead segments

Agents respond to every new lead within 5 minutes via automated WhatsApp

A live dashboard tracking pipeline velocity and conversion rates by agent

title: UGC TikTok Creator for Soundboard App (LitPads)
description:
About Us



LitPads is a custom soundboard app for iPhone, iPad, and Mac used by DJs, streamers, theater producers, worship leaders, and content creators. We offer professional audio features at a one time price of $14.99, competing against apps that charge $159.99. No subscriptions, no ads, no tracking.



App Store: Search "LitPads Custom Soundboard" on the App Store

Website: litpads.app



The Role



We're looking for creative TikTok/Reels UGC creators who can make engaging, authentic short form videos showcasing LitPads in action. You'll create content that feels native to TikTok, not like an ad.



What You'll Do



- Create 15 to 60 second TikTok/Reels videos featuring the LitPads app (3 to 8 videos per month)

- Show real use cases: making beats, triggering sound effects, streaming setups, DJ practice, prank sounds, 
 sounds, etc.

- Follow trending TikTok formats, sounds, and hooks to maximize reach

- Film on your own device (iPhone or iPad) with the app installed

- Deliver raw video files and/or post from your own account (we'll discuss the arrangement)



Content Ideas We Love



"POV: You finally find the perfect soundboard app"

Making a beat or remix live on the pad grid

Reaction style videos discovering app features

"Things I didn't know this app could do" series

Streamer/DJ setup videos featuring LitPads

Side by side comparisons (free vs Pro features)

Sound effect compilations using the app



Requirements



Active TikTok account with at least 1,000 followers (that would be a big plus but is not an actual requirement)

Portfolio or examples of previous UGC/TikTok content

Own an iPhone or iPad (required to use the app)

Good lighting, clean audio, and natural on camera presence

Understanding of TikTok trends, hooks, and what makes content go viral

Can work independently with minimal direction

Reliable internet and ability to deliver on deadlines



Nice to Have



Experience with music, DJing, or audio production

Background in creating content for apps or tech products

Experience with TikTok Shop or affiliate marketing

Bilingual (English + another language) for wider reach



Compensation



Per video rate (please include your rate in your application)

We provide a free LitPads Pro upgrade ($14.99 value)

Bonus structure for videos that exceed performance benchmarks

Long term partnership for top performers



How to Apply



Please include in your application:



-Link to your TikTok profile

- 2 to 3 examples of your best UGC or product related content

- Your per video rate

- A brief pitch: How would you make a soundboard app go viral on TikTok?

- Your availability (how many videos per week/month you can deliver)



We're looking for creators who genuinely enjoy making content and can turn a niche app into something people want to try. If you can make people stop scrolling, we want to hear from you.



Best wishes, 



Marcel

title: Video Editor for Social Media Ads (Meta) – AI-Powered
description:
Hello,

we are a German e-commerce company looking for a Part-Time / Freelance Video Editor for our Social Media Ads on Meta 
 & Instagram). We run two brands – one German shop and one English (US) shop – and need someone who can turn a script into a finished, scroll-stopping ad.

The Tasks



Cutting Meta Ads 
/Instagram) from provided B-Roll, scripts, and AI-generated assets

Generating voiceovers with ElevenLabs (or similar) in German and English based on our scripts

Creating AI avatars / talking-head clips with HeyGen (or similar tools) when needed

Sourcing or generating additional video material (stock, AI video, screen recordings) for everything not covered by our B-Roll

Editing the same ad in two language versions: German and English

Creating Hook Variations per ad (1–3 different hooks – only the first few seconds change)

Clean cuts, subtitles, sound design, pacing optimized for paid social

Delivering ready-to-upload files for Meta Ads Manager



How We Work Together

We provide the script and core B-Roll. You are responsible for turning it into a finished ad – including voiceover generation (ElevenLabs), AI avatars (HeyGen), and sourcing any extra visuals needed to fill the gaps. You work independently on the creative execution.

Important – German Versions

Since you are not a native German speaker and probably only understand English, we want to know how you would handle the German versions (generating German ElevenLabs voiceovers, timing cuts to a language you don't speak, subtitles, etc.). Please explain your approach in your application.

Tools

We work with Adobe Premiere Pro (part of Adobe Creative Cloud). If you don't have your own license, we can invite you to our Adobe Creative Cloud team account. AI tool subscriptions (ElevenLabs, HeyGen) can also be provided by us.

Payment Model

We pay per finished video, not hourly or monthly. We will agree on a fixed price per full ad and a separate (lower) price per hook variation in advance.

How to Apply – Please Read Carefully

To make sure you actually read this full description, please do the following in your application message on OnlineJobs.ph:



Title of your application message: Write the name of our CEO (Geschäftsführer). You can find his name in the Impressum on our German shop: 
/impressum – do NOT write "Geschäftsführer" in the title, write the actual name!

Also add "okay with per-video payment" into the title if you agree with being paid per finished video.

In the message itself, please include:



Your proposed price per full ad (USD)

Your proposed price per hook variation

Estimated time per full ad and additional time per hook variation

How you would handle the German versions as a non-German speaker

Your experience with AI tools: ElevenLabs (voiceovers), HeyGen (AI avatars), and any other AI video/image/audio tools you use (Runway, Kling, Midjourney, Sora, Topaz, etc.) – tell us concretely what you have done with them

Link to your portfolio / showreel – ideally Meta Ads / short-form social content, and examples where you used AI voiceovers or AI avatars







We Are Looking For Someone Who



Has real experience editing short-form social media ads (Meta, TikTok)

Has hands-on experience with ElevenLabs and HeyGen (or comparable AI tools)

Can work from a script independently and source/generate missing visuals

Understands pacing, hooks, and retention for paid social

Is reliable with deadlines and comfortable in Adobe Premiere Pro



We Offer



Fair per-video payment

Long-term collaboration with consistent workload

Adobe Creative Cloud + AI tool licenses provided if needed

Friendly working environment, flexible hours



After your application we will send you a Google Form with a few more questions and a paid test task (we provide script + B-Roll + audio, you deliver one short ad in German and English).

Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Media Buyer
description:
We're a fast-moving direct-response advertising operation running paid Meta campaigns across multiple international markets. We test hard, move fast, and hold a high bar for execution. We're looking for a
 Ads Manager to own the day-to-day of our ad operations — someone who actually knows what they're looking at inside Meta and doesn't need to be babysat.

What you'll be doing:



Launching new ads and test campaigns across multiple ad accounts on a daily basis

Monitoring ad performance and flagging anything that needs attention — rejected ads, budget issues, delivery drops

Analyzing campaign stats and reporting key metrics to the team in a clear, timely way

Alerting the team immediately when ads are rejected and coordinating the fix

Working with management to request new profiles and ad accounts when needed, and keeping track of account health

Staying on top of any platform policy changes or account flags before they become a bigger problem



Who you are:



You've run Meta ad accounts before — not just "boosted posts," actual campaign management with multiple objectives, ad sets, and creative variables

You're comfortable reading data and know the difference between a performance problem and a delivery problem

You're detail-oriented and proactive — if something looks off, you say something without waiting to be asked

You can manage multiple accounts simultaneously without dropping the ball

You communicate clearly and don't overcomplicate your updates



Nice to have:



Experience working with direct-response or e-commerce brands

Familiarity with running ads across international markets

Comfort with ad account structures at scale (multiple BMs, proxies, etc.)



Pay: $5 USD/hour

To apply:

Send a short message outlining your Meta ads experience, the types of accounts/budgets you've managed, and why you're a fit. Include the word "media" at the start of your application to confirm you've read this post in full. Applications without it will not be considered.

title: HR Manager - QB Commerce (Remote, Full-time)
description:
HR Manager - QB Commerce (Remote, Full-time)



About QB Commerce



QB Commerce is a fast-growing US-operating jewelry e-commerce brand selling worldwide. We ship internationally through global fulfillment and in less than 9 months we scaled to a team of 40+ people. We move fast, we hire smart, and we build a team of specialists who are the best at what they do. This is a company where your work has direct impact and where there is serious room to grow as we expand.



About the role



We are hiring our first dedicated HR Manager. At QB Commerce, HR is one of the most important departments in the entire company because the quality of our team is what drives everything else. This is not a support role sitting on the sidelines. You will be at the center of our growth, working directly alongside the founders and department leaders as their right hand on everything people-related.



You will own HR completely. Your main focus will be recruitment: finding, screening, and onboarding the right people across OnlineJobs.ph, Upwork, and LinkedIn. Our team is made up of specialised e-commerce professionals and you need to understand these roles to hire well for them. When a department leader needs to grow their team, you are the first person they call.



Roles you will be hiring for



Video editors

AI content editors

Creative strategists

Head of operations

Inventory managers

Performance marketers

Product researchers

And more e-commerce specialist roles



What you will do



Work closely with founders and department leaders to understand hiring needs and team gaps

Own the full recruitment cycle from job post to signed contract

Write targeted role-specific job posts that attract quality candidates

Screen and shortlist applicants based on clear criteria

Conduct first-round interviews and pass qualified candidates to the hiring manager

Manage onboarding for all new hires, contracts, tools access, first-week experience

Build and maintain a candidate database and hiring tracker

Create and document HR processes, templates, and an employee handbook from scratch

Be the internal go-to for tea
mbers on people-related matters

Proactively improve our hiring process over time



What we are looking for



3+ years of HR or recruitment experience with a strong e-commerce hiring background

Proven hands-on experience with OnlineJobs.ph, you know how to find quality not just volume

You genuinely understand e-commerce roles: you can evaluate a video editor's portfolio, assess a creative strategist's experience, or spot a strong ops candidate

Comfortable working directly with founders and senior leaders, you can hold your own in a room with decision makers

Experience running a full hiring funnel independently without needing to be managed

Excellent written English, your job posts and candidate communications represent our brand

Highly organised and process-driven, you build systems not workarounds

Comfortable working with remote tools like Google Sheets, Notion, or Slack

Reliable internet connection, your own equipment, and a dedicated workspace

Any additional language on top of English is a plus



This role is NOT for you if



You need constant direction to know what to work on

title: Hiring manager | US based Jewelry brand
description:
HR Manager - QB Commerce (Remote, Full-time)



About QB Commerce



QB Commerce is a fast-growing US-operating jewelry e-commerce brand selling worldwide. We ship internationally through global fulfillment and in less than 9 months we scaled to a team of 40+ people. We move fast, we hire smart, and we build a team of specialists who are the best at what they do. This is a company where your work has direct impact and where there is serious room to grow as we expand.



About the role



We are hiring our first dedicated HR Manager. At QB Commerce, HR is one of the most important departments in the entire company because the quality of our team is what drives everything else. This is not a support role sitting on the sidelines. You will be at the center of our growth, working directly alongside the founders and department leaders as their right hand on everything people-related.



You will own HR completely. Your main focus will be recruitment: finding, screening, and onboarding the right people across OnlineJobs.ph, Upwork, and LinkedIn. Our team is made up of specialised e-commerce professionals and you need to understand these roles to hire well for them. When a department leader needs to grow their team, you are the first person they call.



Roles you will be hiring for



Video editors

AI content editors

Creative strategists

Head of operations

Inventory managers

Performance marketers

Product researchers

And more e-commerce specialist roles



What you will do



Work closely with founders and department leaders to understand hiring needs and team gaps

Own the full recruitment cycle from job post to signed contract

Write targeted role-specific job posts that attract quality candidates

Screen and shortlist applicants based on clear criteria

Conduct first-round interviews and pass qualified candidates to the hiring manager

Manage onboarding for all new hires, contracts, tools access, first-week experience

Build and maintain a candidate database and hiring tracker

Create and document HR processes, templates, and an employee handbook from scratch

Be the internal go-to for tea
mbers on people-related matters

Proactively improve our hiring process over time



What we are looking for



3+ years of HR or recruitment experience with a strong e-commerce hiring background

Proven hands-on experience with OnlineJobs.ph, you know how to find quality not just volume

You genuinely understand e-commerce roles: you can evaluate a video editor's portfolio, assess a creative strategist's experience, or spot a strong ops candidate

Comfortable working directly with founders and senior leaders, you can hold your own in a room with decision makers

Experience running a full hiring funnel independently without needing to be managed

Excellent written English, your job posts and candidate communications represent our brand

Highly organised and process-driven, you build systems not workarounds

Comfortable working with remote tools like Google Sheets, Notion, or Slack

Reliable internet connection, your own equipment, and a dedicated workspace

Any additional language on top of English is a plus



This role is NOT for you if



You need constant direction to know what to work on

Your HR experience is mainly admin, payroll, or compliance

You are not familiar with e-commerce roles and how to evaluate them

You treat hiring as a numbers game rather than a quality match

You are looking for a quiet low-responsibility position

Direct access to founders and department leaders from day one

Serious growth potential, as we scale so does your role

Apply via the link below. You will be asked for your resume and a short introduction video of 2 to 3 minutes. We review every application personally.

title: Video Editor (Remote) – U.S.-Based Wellness Company
description:
--Please Read carefully--



About Us

We’re a U.S.-based wellness company focused on advanced health technologies like Exercise With Oxygen Therapy (EWOT) and Red Light Therapy—helping people improve energy, recovery, and overall well-being.



If you’re someone who loves creating engaging content and can work efficiently without sacrificing quality, this could be a great fit.



What You’ll Work On

- YouTube long-form videos

- Short-form content (quick Opus clips + more polished, engaging edits)

- Podcast videos (basic cuts, minimal editing, intro/outro)



What We’re Looking For

- Strong editing skills for both long-form and short-form content

- Fast turnaround without compromising quality

- Good sense of pacing, storytelling, and viewer engagement

- Reliable and consistent communicator

- Experience with tools like CapCut (preferred), Premiere Pro, or similar

- Ability to deliver 2–3 videos per week

- Understanding of hooks, retention, and content flow



How to Apply



Apply with the following:

1. Subject line: Your Name – Video Editor

2. Include the word “wellness” in your application (required)

3. Your portfolio

4. A short note on your skills and why you’re a great fit



Note: Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a video test trial as part of the selection process.



We’re excited to see your work!

title: Video Editor (Short + Long Form) – Clean, Minimal Style
description:
We are looking for a video editor to help build a cybersecurity-focused YouTube channel for small business owners.



This is NOT a typical “viral content” editing role.



We are building a clean, professional, high-trust channel — not entertainment, not hype, not flashy edits.



THE ROLE



we are looking for someone with great attention to detail as we have strict instructions that need to be adhered too. 



You will start by editing short-form videos (YouTube Shorts).



As the channel grows, you will progress into:

 • longer YouTube videos

 • structured funnel content (multi-video sequences)



This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with a system.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

 • Editing short-form videos initially

 • Following a clean, structured visual style with references

 • Using simple layouts, text, and minimal motion

 • Later: editing longer-form videos



Scripts and voiceovers will be provided.



THE STYLE (IMPORTANT)



We are NOT looking for:

 • fast-paced TikTok edits

 • flashy transitions

 • loud effects

 • over-designed visuals



We ARE looking for:

 • clean layouts (like a simple app screen)

 • slow, smooth motion

 • minimal text animation

 • calm, professional feel



Think:

clean software interface + easy to understand + professional.

To confirm attention to detail, include the word “DETAIL” in capitals at the

very start of your application message.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

 • Videos feel simple and clear instantly

 • Viewer understands what’s happening without effort

 • Consistent style across all videos

 • Ability to follow structure as videos get longer



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:

 • You like clean, minimal design

 • You can follow instructions carefully

 • You pay attention to detail

 • You want long-term work

 • You are open to growing into long-form editing



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

 • You prefer flashy or viral-style editing

 • You rely on heavy effects or transitions

 • You don’t like structured systems

 • You only want short-form work



WHAT YOU’LL RECEIVE

 • Clear visual playbooks

 • Reference videos with instructions

 • Scripts + voiceovers



OPPORTUNITY

 • Long-term consistent work

 • Growth into full YouTube production

 • Potential for increased responsibility



Start the second word of your application message with the word CYBER in capitals.

Applications without this will be ignored.



Good Luck.

Experience with online course platforms (LearnWorlds, Teachable, Thinkific or similar)

Strong English (written and spoken)

Organised, reliable and able to work independently

are will to pay up to 1000 euros month if assistent shows value

Send a short video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and telling me about your experience with video editing and online course platforms. Include links to any previous work if available.

title: Bookkeeper - UK
description:
UK Bookkeeper Needed



We are a UK based B2B marketing agency looking for a reliable and experienced bookkeeper to support our ongoing finance operations.



This is not a one off project. We are looking for someone who can take ownership of our day to day bookkeeping and ensure everything is accurate, up to date, and ready for our accountant.



Role responsibilities

Proactively chase outstanding invoices in a professional manner

title: Instagram Growth & Community Manager
description:
About the Company

Born from Flame (BFF) is a Canadian culinary brand built around a cooking competition, a West African flame-forward restaurant, and an online store. We are building from the ground up and need someone to help grow our Instagram presence from zero.



What You Will Do

This is a growth and engagement role — not a content creation role. We provide the images and videos. Your job is to grow the account, engage the community, and keep it warm every day.



Follow 50+ targeted Canadian Instagram accounts per day, starting with Ontario — food creators, home cooks, culinary students, West African diaspora pages, and everyday Ontarians

After each follow, send a short personal DM introducing Born from Flame and what we are building — make it enticing enough that they follow back

When we send you content, write a caption in the BFF voice, send it to us on Slack for review, then post it (content is not provided every day)

Reply to every comment and DM on the account daily

Submit a short weekly report — followers gained, DM response rate, top post





What You Will NOT Do



Create or shoot content (we handle that)

Run paid ads

Post every single day (only when content is provided)





Growth Targets



50+ new followers per day (minimum)

250+ per week

1,000+ per month





What We Need



Active on Instagram and knows how it works

Strong caption writing — short, punchy, on-brand

Shows up every day without being chased

Genuine interest in food or culture

Available on episode release days





Compensation



$2 CAD per hour

4 hours per day, 5 days per week

$40 CAD per week / $160 CAD per month

Part-time contract, remote

title: Marketing Specialist for Online Course Business
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant - Marketing Specialist for Online Course Business

 Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly motivated and skilled Virtual Assistant with a strong background in marketing to join our team. Our ideal candidate is an expert in developing and executing marketing strategies tailored to our unique audience - women aged 30-60 who are seeking transformation after experiencing narcissistic abuse. This role demands a creative thinker with experience in digital marketing, particularly in leveraging social media platforms like Instagram, to increase engagement, convert leads, and drive sales of our online courses and products.

Key Responsibilities:

- Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies that align with our business goals and target audience needs.

- Craft compelling sales scripts for
 sequences and Instagram chats that effectively communicate the value of our courses and products, leading to high conversion rates.

- Manage and optimize our use of automation tools (such as ManyChat and Zapier) to streamline the client onboarding process and enhance lead capture mechanisms.

- Analyze and leverage data from our existing audience on Instagram (200k+ followers) to refine marketing approaches and increase engagement.

- Create and monitor the performance of evergreen webinars and other marketing materials to ensure they are effectively contributing to sales goals.

- Assist in the development and marketing of low ticket offers and other new products, aligning with the overall brand and mission.

- Provide insights on niche marketing strategies to better target our specific audience and stand out in the marketplace.

#### Requirements:

- Proven experience in digital marketing, with a strong portfolio of successful campaigns, particularly in the context of online education or personal development sectors.

- Excellent copywriting skills, with the ability to create engaging and persuasive content across various platforms.

- Proficient in using marketing automation tools and CRM platforms, with a preference for candidates experienced in ManyChat, Zapier, and Kajabi.

- Deep understanding of social media marketing, particularly on Instagram, with a knack for creating compelling Stories and Reels that drive engagement and conversions.

- Ability to analyze marketing data and metrics to inform strategy adjustments and improvements.

- Creative problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently.

- Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work effectively with the team and provide regular updates on marketing efforts.

Additional Information:

- This is a remote position, offering flexible hours to suit your schedule.

- You will be working directly with the founder, a passionate expert in the field, dedicated to making a significant impact on the lives of our clients.

- Opportunities for professional growth and to be part of a mission-driven team making a real difference.

title: MANYCHAT EXPERT
description:
MANYCHAT EXPERT

We are looking for someone who lives and breathes DM automation.



ABOUT US

We run a membership community and recovery framework for women rebuilding their identity after narcissistic and coercive relationships. Our founder has built a 288K-strong Instagram following on the back of one thing: telling the truth about what it actually takes to heal.



Our DM funnel is a core part of how we connect with our community and convert warm followers into members. And we need someone who can own it.

If you know ManyChat the way most people know their morning coffee routine — this role is for you.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Managing and optimising our existing ManyChat flows and keyword triggers

Building new automations for campaigns, launches, and lead magnet funnels

Troubleshooting flow drop-offs and identifying conversion leaks

Setting up comment-to-DM automations tied to Instagram content

Integrating ManyChat with our
 platform and Kajabi CRM

Analysing performance data and making clear recommendations

Testing flows end-to-end before they go live — every time

Knowledge of how to broadcast as well as setting up longer conversations with warm leads



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU

Proven, hands-on ManyChat experience — not just familiarity, actual builds

Deep understanding of keyword triggers, flow logic, and conditional branching

Experience integrating ManyChat with Instagram and external platforms

Strong grasp of DM funnel strategy — you understand why flows are built, not just how

Ability to spot a broken flow fast and fix it without drama

Clear communication — we need to know what you built and why

Bonus: experience working with coaches, course creators, or membership businesses

ONE QUESTION BEFORE YOU APPLY

We read every application. To make sure yours stands out, please answer this in your application:



“Describe a ManyChat flow you built for an Instagram-based business. What was the goal, how did you build it, and what happened to the numbers after?”



THE DETAILS

Remote — work from anywhere

Part-time / project basis to start, with room to grow

Approx. 2 hours overlap with AEST preferred for communication

Please include your hourly rate or project rate in your application



TO APPLY

Send your resume, portfolio, and your answer to the question above to the
 address in this listing.

Subject line: ManyChat Expert — [Your Name]



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to complete a small paid test task.



We can’t wait to meet you.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller
description:
Real Estate Acquisition Specialist (Cold Calling)



Remote | Long-Term | High-Growth Opportunity



Compensation: $800 USD / month base



Performance Bonuses & Growth Path

(52,000 PHP / month + upside)



About the Role



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate investment company specializing in Airbnb arbitrage and corporate housing partnerships. We work directly with landlords and property managers to secure long-term leases for professionally managed short-term rentals.



We are looking for a hungry, confident Real Estate Acquisition Specialist who thrives on the phone, knows how to control conversations, and wants to grow with a serious company not bounce from gig to gig.



This is a long-term role with real upside for the right person.



What You’ll Be Doing



Outbound Calling & Deal Sourcing



Call U.S. landlords, property managers, and building owners daily



Confidently present our partnership model and value proposition



Overcome objections and qualify serious opportunities



Lead Qualification & Follow-Ups



Identify decision-makers and decision-ready properties



Book follow-up conversations for our acquisitions team



Maintain clean notes and lead status tracking



Lead List Building

Tracking & Reporting

Who This Is For



? You sound professional, confident, and natural in English

How to Apply



Apply here: 
/to/o0TCw922





Serious applicants only. If you want a long-term role with real growth this is it.

title: SEO Link Builder (Outreach Specialist)
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and proactive SEO Link Builder who can consistently acquire high-quality backlinks using a range of proven link building strategies. This role requires someone who understands both free (organic outreach) and paid (placement-based) link acquisition methods and knows how to apply them strategically to drive rankings and organic growth.



Key Responsibilities:



Plan and execute scalable link building campaigns across multiple strategies

Build high-quality backlinks using a mix of free and paid methods, including outreach, partnerships, and placements

Consistently deliver up to 30 new quality backlinks per month per website, while maintaining strict quality standards

Manage and execute link building campaigns across multiple websites simultaneously

Prospect, qualify, and prioritise backlink opportunities based on SEO impact

Conduct personalised outreach to website owners, editors, and publishers

Negotiate placements where required while maintaining quality standards

Perform competitor backlink analysis to identify gaps and opportunities

Maintain outreach pipelines and manage relationships with publishers

Track, measure, and report on link performance (rankings, traffic impact, indexation)



Core Link Building Strategies You Must Be Proficient In:



Guest posting (manual outreach and placements)

Niche edits / link insertions

Broken link building

Moving Man Method

Resource page link building

Digital PR / HARO-style outreach

Competitor backlink replication



Backlink Qualification Criteria:

You must demonstrate a strong ability to evaluate link opportunities using the following metrics:



Relevance

Strong topical alignment with our niche

Contextual relevance of the linking page (not just the domain)

Authority

Domain Rating (DR) / Domain Authority (DA)

Referring domains profile

Organic keyword footprint (not just DR as a vanity metric)

Traffic Quality

Consistent organic traffic (via Ahrefs/SEMrush)

Keywords ranking in relevant niches

Avoid sites with inflated or irrelevant traffic sources

Outbound Link Profile

Ratio of outbound links to content

No spammy or irrelevant casino/adult/low-quality links

Editorial standards of the site

Indexation & Visibility

Pages are indexed in Google

Site is actively ranking and not deindexed or penalised

Recent content is being crawled and ranked



Required Skills and Experience:



Proven experience building high-quality backlinks that improve rankings

Demonstrated ability to consistently deliver up to 30 quality backlinks per month per website

Proven ability to manage link building across multiple websites at the same time

Strong understanding of both white-hat and grey-hat link building approaches

Ability to scale outreach while maintaining link quality

Experience with tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Hunter, Pitchbox, or similar

Strong written communication for outreach and negotiation

Ability to identify low-quality or risky links before acquisition



Application Requirement (Mandatory):

As part of your application, you must submit a 3–5 minute Loom video explaining the Moving Man Method.



Your video must clearly cover:



What the Moving Man Method is

How to find link opportunities (step-by-step)

Tools you would use (e.g., Ahrefs, Google search operators)

How you would structure your outreach message

Why this method works and when to use it



Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Social Media Manager (Content Strategy, Creation + Paid Ads – LinkedIn Focus)
description:
What This Role Actually Is



This is not a coordinator or someone who just schedules posts.



You are responsible for:



Ideating, creating, and publishing content

Owning LinkedIn organic growth and inbound lead generation

Managing paid campaigns (LinkedIn + Meta)

Executing from strategy through to posting and optimisation

Must-Have Experience

Proven experience managing LinkedIn content end-to-end (strategy, writing, posting)

Strong experience with paid ads (LinkedIn + Meta)

Experience working with Australian businesses/market

Ability to link content and ads to pipeline and revenue

What You’ll Be Doing



Content Strategy & Ideation



Plan content calendars aligned to offers and campaigns

Generate high-performing ideas consistently

Align content with business goals and lead generation



Content Creation



Write LinkedIn posts (founder-led, authority, conversion-driven)

Create supporting assets (basic visuals, carousels if needed)

Adapt content for different formats and campaigns



Publishing & Scheduling



Schedule and manage posting cadence

Optimise timing and consistency

Manage comments and basic engagement



Paid Ads



Plan, launch, and optimise LinkedIn and Meta campaigns

Test hooks, creatives, and offers

Work organic insights into paid and vice versa



Performance & Optimisation



Track performance across organic and paid

Identify what’s working and double down

Continuously improve messaging and angles

What We Care About

You can take an idea from concept to published post

You understand what makes content convert, not just look good

You think in terms of funnels and outcomes

You don’t need hand-holding to execute

What We Don’t Want

People who only “manage” or schedule

Designers without marketing thinking

Pure strategists who can’t execute

No paid ads experience

Key Skills

LinkedIn content creation (personal brand + company)

Copywriting (hooks, storytelling, conversion)

Content planning and scheduling tools

Paid ads (LinkedIn Ads, Meta Ads)

Basic design (Canva or similar is fine)

Analytical mindset

Application Requirement



Submit a 2–3 minute Loom video covering:



Examples of content you’ve personally created (not just managed)

Results from LinkedIn organic and paid ads

Your process for planning, creating, and scheduling content

2–3 content ideas you would execute for Warren Digital immediately

Bonus Points

Experience working with agencies

B2B marketing experience

Founder-led content experience

Experience turning content into inbound leads

title: Video Editor — AI-Powered Ad Creative (E-Commerce)
description:
ABOUT US

Korvanis is a direct-to-consumer health & wellness e-commerce brand selling therapeutic home devices in Czech Republic and Slovakia. We help people with chronic back pain through innovative products advertised on Meta 
/Instagram).



THE ROLE

We're looking for a full-time video editor to create high-converting video ads from AI-generated assets. You are NOT shooting footage — you're combining AI-generated clips, voiceovers and images into polished ad creatives.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY

- Edit 2-3 polished VSL-style video ads per day (2-5 minutes each) with AI voiceover, subtitles, transitions, and sound effects

- Add clean, synced subtitles/captions to all videos

- Handle sound design: music selection, SFX layering, audio leveling, pacing

- Follow creative briefs with competitor reference videos and scripts provided in English

- Translation to Czech/Slovak is handled by AI tools — no language skills needed



TOOLS WE PROVIDE (No Cost to You)

- Claude AI (scripting, translation, creative support)

- ElevenLabs (AI voiceover)

- Kie.ai API (AI image/video generation)

- CapCut Pro

- Heygen (AI avatar/video)

- Full creative briefs with competitor references



REQUIREMENTS

- Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

- Sound design experience: music, SFX, audio leveling, pacing

- Clean subtitle/caption creation synced to voiceover

- Comfortable working with AI-generated assets (we train you on our workflow)

- Eye for direct-response ad pacing — you understand the first 3 seconds matter most

- Hardware: minimum 16GB RAM, stable internet, CapCut desktop capable

- Self-motivated, async worker — deliverables due by 6:00 PM CET daily



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience editing ads for Meta/TikTok/YouTube

- Familiarity with AI video tools (Kling, Runway, Pika, Heygen)

- Understanding of direct-response marketing (hooks, CTAs, urgency)

- Health/wellness or e-commerce experience



COMPENSATION

- $400/month paid biweekly ($200 every 2 weeks)

- Performance bonus: $40-50 per winning ad ($1,000+ spend over 14 days with 2.5+ ROAS)

- Top editors realistically earn 2-4 bonuses/month on top of base

- 3-day paid trial period



HOW WE WORK

- Fully asynchronous communication

- You receive: script in English + competitor reference + creative direction

- You deliver, we give feedback, you iterate

- Quick calls when both online, no fixed meeting schedule



HOW TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY

Applications missing any of these will NOT be reviewed:



1. Your portfolio or showreel — 3 to 5 of your best edited videos (ads preferred)

2. A short Loom or video message (1-2 min) introducing yourself, your experience, and your editing setup

3. Answer this question in your message: "What makes the first 3 seconds of a video ad effective?"



Top candidates will receive a short PAID test: edit a 2-3 minutes video

title: Medical Tourism Sales & Client Coordinator
description:
BeyondMed Group Ltd is a fast-growing international medical tourism company connecting patients from the UK, USA, Canada and France with world-class cosmetic surgery in Tunisia. We are a small, ambitious team now building our sales operation in Manila to expand into English-speaking markets.

This is a ground-floor opportunity — you will be one of our first hires in the Philippines and will work directly with the founder.



Your Role

You will be the first point of contact for international patients inquiring about cosmetic surgery packages in Tunisia. Your job is to build trust, answer questions, qualify leads, and guide patients from first inquiry to confirmed booking.



What You Will Do



Respond to incoming leads from
, Instagram and our website via WhatsApp,
 and social media

Qualify leads by understanding the patient's procedure interest, budget and timeline

Follow up consistently with warm leads using our CRM system

Send patients information packages, quotes and booking details

Coordinate with the Tunisia clinic team to confirm surgery dates and packages

Maintain accurate records of all leads and conversations in the CRM

Meet weekly and monthly sales targets set by the founder

Assist with English-language social media responses and community management





What We Are Looking For



Minimum 2 years experience in sales, customer service or client coordination

Excellent English — written and spoken, must sound natural and professional to UK/US/Canadian clients

Strong communicator — warm, confident, empathetic and persuasive

Experience with CRM tools (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, or similar)

Comfortable handling sensitive conversations (medical procedures require trust and discretion)

Self-motivated and target-driven

Experience in medical, wellness or tourism industry is a strong advantage

Experience working with foreign clients or international companies is a big plus





What We Offer



PHP 35,000 – 40,000/month base salary

Commission on every confirmed booking (structure discussed at interview)

Work directly with the founder — real responsibility from day one

Full sales training including CRM, medical tourism knowledge and sales scripts

Opportunity to grow into a senior role as the team expands

Exposure to international markets (UK, USA, Canada)





How to Apply

Send your CV to 
 with subject line:

"Sales Coordinator Application – [Your Name]"

Tell us in 3–4 sentences why you are the right person for this role. Applications without this will not be considered.

title: Davinci Resolve- Full Time Editor
description:
About VYBE



VYBE is a Chicago-based photo and video company bringing brands to life through bold, high-energy content. From product launches and social campaigns to large-scale event activations, we create visuals that feel real, engaging, and built to move people.



We’re growing fast and building a team of creatives who want to grow with us.



The Role



We’re looking for a Full-Time Remote Video Editor who lives in DaVinci Resolve.



This isn’t just about cutting clips — it’s about shaping stories, building energy, and creating content people actually want to watch. You’ll be editing everything from fast-paced social reels to polished brand pieces and event recaps.



If you’re someone who cares about the feel of a video just as much as the technical side, you’ll fit right in.



Why We Use DaVinci Resolve



We run everything through Resolve because it allows real collaboration — shared timelines, live updates, consistent color, and a smoother workflow across the team.



It keeps us fast, efficient, and creatively aligned on every project.



What You’ll Do

Edit branded content, product features, and social-first videos

Craft high-energy reels and longer-form storytelling pieces

Organize footage, timelines, and project assets cleanly

Work closely with our creative director to dial in revisions

Maintain VYBE’s signature pacing, color, and overall feel

Stay tapped into trends and bring fresh ideas to the table

What We’re Looking For

Advanced experience in DaVinci Resolve (non-negotiable)

Strong instincts for pacing, music syncing, and storytelling

Reliable, responsive, and deadline-driven

Organized and detail-focused (this matters a lot here)

Open to feedback and constantly improving

Positive energy — we move fast and keep it collaborative

What You Get

Fully remote, full-time position

Consistent work with real brands and real impact

Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving creative company

Flexible schedule (we care about deadlines, not micromanaging)

A team that actually collaborates and pushes each other creatively

How to Apply



No résumé needed — your work speaks louder.



Send us:



A few samples of your work (social or brand content preferred)

A quick intro about you, your experience, and what excites you about editing



Subject line:

VYBE DAVINCI EDITOR 2026 — [Your Name]

title: Funnel Builder / Advertorial Page Builder (Funnelish)
description:
Hey,

My team and I are looking for a skilled Funnel Builder / Advertorial Page Builder to join our eCommerce business part-time.



This is a hands-on execution role for someone who knows how to take written copy, references, and competitor examples and turn them into clean, engaging, high-converting advertorial pages inside Funnelish.



You will be responsible for building advertorial funnels that are visually strong, easy to read, mobile-friendly, and ready to test.



What you’ll be doing



- Building advertorial-style pages inside Funnelish

- Recreating and adapting competitor advertorials for our own brands

- Following references and executing layouts with strong structure and readability

- Formatting long-form advertorial copy properly using headlines, sections, CTAs, images, spacing, and visual hierarchy

- Adding or creating simple visuals, graphics, GIFs, and supporting elements that make the page more engaging

- Improving the overall flow so the advertorial is interesting to read and does not feel boring or heavy

- Making sure pages look great on both desktop and mobile

- Occasionally helping with localization or light rewriting/adaptation of advertorial pages when needed



What I provide



- Ready written copy

- Clear instructions

- References from competitor pages or existing funnels

- Feedback and direction on what needs to be improved



Your job is to take the material and bring it to life inside Funnelish with strong execution.



ROLE



You are responsible for assembling, formatting, and visually enhancing advertorial funnels so they are ready to launch and test.



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Build full advertorial pages in Funnelish

- Recreate competitor-inspired advertorial structures for our brands

- Follow provided references and execute them accurately

- Create or source simple but effective visuals that improve readability and attention

- Structure long-form pages clearly with strong layout and flow

- Optimize pages for mobile-first reading

- Maintain clean spacing, hierarchy, and professional presentation

- Communicate clearly and deliver work on time



RESULTS



- Fully built advertorial pages ready to launch

- Clean, professional, and engaging layouts

- Pages that are easy to read and visually dynamic

- Strong execution with minimal revisions

- Reliable turnaround and consistent quality over time



REQUIREMENTS



- Experience with Funnelish

- Good understanding of advertorial-style pages and direct-response layouts

- Strong eye for layout, readability, hierarchy, and structure

- Ability to recreate pages based on references

- Ability to create or source simple attention-grabbing visuals

- Good English

- Strong attention to detail

- Good laptop or PC setup

- Stable and fast internet connection

- Reliable communication and ability to follow instructions



IMPORTANT



This is initially a part-time role at around 20 hours per week.



Starting rate is $5/hour.



There will be a 2-week paid trial first.



If everything goes well, this can become long-term ongoing work, with more responsibility, more hours, and bonuses over time. Full-time may also be possible later if the fit is strong.



I am looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and hungry to grow with the business.



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To apply, start your application with: FUNNEL



Any application that does not start with FUNNEL will be ignored.



Also, please answer these short questions:



1. How much experience do you have with Funnelish?

2. How long would it take you to build a strong advertorial page if the copy and reference are provided?

3. Are you comfortable recreating competitor advertorials and adapting them for our brands?

4. What tools do you use for visuals, graphics, images, or GIFs? (Veo, Kling, Higgsfield etc.)

5. What is your internet speed and what device/setup do you work on?



If you do not answer all questions, your application will be skipped.



PORTFOLIO REQUIREMENT



Please include:



- 2–3 advertorial pages you built

- 2–3 sales pages or similar landing pages you built

- Examples in eCommerce or similar direct-response niches



If you cannot provide relevant examples, please do not apply.

title: Social Media and Content Coordinator
description:
Role Summary

This is a social media execution and digital content support role. The coordinator is responsible for managing the social media presence of two healthcare brands — handling content scheduling, Canva graphic and infographic creation, content repurposing, community engagement, podcast support, monthly content calendaring, competitor monitoring, digital asset building, RSS feed monitoring, webinar promotion, Google My Business maintenance, and Google Ads reporting. Creative direction and vision come from the CEO. Excellence in this role means consistent execution, a growing digital asset library, and a social media presence that runs without the CEO needing to follow up.

 

Core Responsibilities

1. Social Media Content Execution

• Upload, format, and schedule social media posts in Publer for both AFCN Wellness Centre and AFCN Learning Institute

• Maintain the evergreen recurring content library — all posts set to annual reoccurrence cycles (not monthly — this is non-negotiable)

• Audit and organize content library labels, categories, and scheduling gaps as directed

• Format and resize graphics in Canva using provided brand templates

• Prepare and publish student certificate posts using the Clinical Partner Educator page as the verified source for name and location; share graduate posts to the AFCN Wellness Centre page

• Write or lightly adapt post captions when directed, following brand voice guidelines provided

• After posts are published, click through users who liked posts and invite them to like the page or group

• While switched to the AFCN Learning Institute page profile, like similar and relevant pages to grow follower visibility and draw attention to the Education page

• Share clinical partner posts and wins to the 
 Learning Institute
 page and the Foot Masters VIP group

• Create clinical partner location-specific posts in the content calendar, tagging the clinical partner location; share strong clinical partner content to the AFCN Learning Institute page

• Track and report basic engagement metrics monthly — including likes, reach, follower growth, and post performance — for both companies

• Monitor RSS feed automations for both company websites — the RSS feeds connected to Publer must automatically post any new blog content; confirm each new blog post triggers correctly and flag any automation failures immediately

• Post directly into monthly webinar
 events to generate interest and engagement; share webinar event posts to similar and related
 groups to expand reach

• Monitor and verify that webinar dates are consistent and accurate across both the Thinkific platform and all social media platforms — flag and correct any discrepancies immediately

 

2. Canva Graphic & Infographic Creation

• Design branded infographics for the AFCN Learning Institute to be used in courses, webinars, and social media posts — educating students and foot care professionals on clinical topics, tools, and best practices

• Create new social media graphics for both companies using provided Canva brand templates — quote cards, promotional posts, event graphics, and educational visuals

• Repurpose and upgrade existing content by replacing outdated images, improving visual quality, and refreshing older posts with updated branded visuals

• Convert blog posts and webinar content into social media graphic sets and infographic formats ready for scheduling in Publer

 

3. Content Repurposing & Upgrades

• Review existing blog posts and webinar content and break them down into social media captions, graphic sets, or short educational content pieces

• Identify evergreen content that can be reformatted or visually upgraded and action with CEO approval

• Ensure all repurposed content is properly labeled, organized, and added to the digital asset library for future reuse

 

4.
 Group Monitoring — Foot Masters VIP

• Monitor the Foot Masters VIP
 group daily for new posts, comments, and member activity

• Respond to straightforward engagement — welcoming new members, liking posts, acknowledging comments — using the brand voice guidelines provided

• Flag anything requiring the CEO attention, a clinical response, or escalation — do not respond independently to sensitive or clinical questions

 

5. Podcast Support

• Format and upload podcast show notes as directed

• Schedule and publish episode graphics across social media platforms

• Ensure episode release dates and descriptions are consistent across all platforms

 

6. Monthly Content Calendar

• Build a draft monthly content calendar in Publer for CEO review — organizing scheduled evergreen posts, specialty posts, webinar promotions, and any upcoming campaigns

• Submit the draft calendar to the CEO by the last week of each month for the following month

• Incorporate CEO feedback and finalize the schedule before the month begins

 

7. Competitor & Industry Monitoring

• Monitor similar foot care, nursing, and health education social media accounts weekly — tracking what they are posting, new content trends, and any notable campaigns

• Deliver a simple weekly summary report to the CEO and Operations Manager flagging anything worth noting — new trends, competitor activity, content ideas, or industry news

• This is a monitoring and reporting role only — strategy decisions based on findings remain with the CEO and Operations Manager

 

8. Google My Business

• Maintain and update Google My Business profiles for all clinic locations

• Ensure business hours, services, photos, and contact information remain accurate

• Monitor for flagged content or required updates and action promptly

 

9. Google Ads Monitoring & Reporting

• Monitor active Google Ads campaigns for both companies and flag performance issues to the CEO

• Assist with basic Google Ads setup when directed by the CEO

• Pull and organize monthly Google Ads performance reports for CEO review

 

10. Digital Asset Management

• Organize, label, and archive all digital assets including graphics, photos, videos, and branded documents

• Build and maintain a growing library of reusable social media assets — templates, branded images, student celebration graphics, and clinical partner visuals

• Ensure all assets are clearly named, categorized, and easy to locate

• Format and assemble marketing packages for local health professionals and referral partners using provided brand templates and direction

 

What This Role Is Not

To be clear about scope and expectations:

 

• This role does not involve social media strategy or strategic decision-making based on competitor findings — that remains with the CEO and Operations Manager

• This role does not involve original content ideation or campaign creation — creative direction comes from the CEO

• This role does not involve client or student communications — that is handled by the office and operations team

• This role does not involve website maintenance or coding — that is handled separately

• This role does not require independent judgment on brand decisions — when in doubt, ask before acting

• This role does not involve community outreach, partnership development, or local market research — that is handled by the Operations Manager

 

Accountability & Communication Standards

• Log every work session in the assigned Google Calendar with a clear task description and time — this is non-negotiable and must be completed daily

• Send a Friday weekly summary every week without being asked — a brief 5-bullet recap of what was completed that week, sent directly to the CEO

• Payment is processed biweekly by Jewel — Jewel will cross-reference Google Calendar logs before each payment is released

• Communicate proactively if a task is unclear before starting — do not guess and correct after

• Respond to messages within one business day

• Flag errors immediately and correct without being asked twice

• Complete all assigned Loom onboarding training before beginning independent tasks

 

Compensation & Growth

• Starting rate is $5.00 USD per hour at 20 hours per week

• A formal performance review will be conducted at 120 days

• Strong performers who demonstrate reliability, quality execution, and proactive communication will advance following the review

• This is a long-term role — we invest in people who invest in us

 

What Success Looks Like

• The CEO does not have to follow up on scheduled tasks

• The recurring content library runs without gaps or errors

• RSS feed automations are functioning correctly and every new blog post publishes to social media without manual intervention

• Webinar dates are accurate and consistent across Thinkific and all social media platforms at all times

• A growing infographic and visual asset library supports both the Institute courses and social media content

• The monthly draft content calendar is delivered to the CEO before the start of each month

• A weekly competitor and industry monitoring report is delivered consistently without prompting

• Foot Masters VIP group is actively monitored and engagement is handled promptly within brand voice guidelines

• A growing, well-organized digital asset library that makes future content creation faster

• Google My Business profiles are current and accurate at all times

• Google Ads reports are delivered on time and without prompting

• Every invoice is backed by a matching, detailed calendar log

• Errors are caught early, communicated honestly, and corrected immediately

• The CEO gains back time — not spends more of it managing this role
