title: Compliance Researcher Virtual Assistant (Part-time / Full-time Remote)
description:
About the Company



We are an early-stage SaaS startup building ComplianceOS — an intelligent compliance operating system for U.S. construction contractors and trades businesses. Our platform helps contractors track licenses, permits, insurance, and certifications so they avoid costly fines, project shutdowns, and lost bids.



We are currently in the MVP stage and need help building the core requirements database that powers our gap analysis engine.



Note: create a video to have an intro about yourself, your outstanding works in the past (with quantitative data) and why you are the best fit for this position?



# Job Summary

We are looking for a smart, organized, and detail-oriented Compliance Researcher VA to help map licensing, permit, and compliance requirements for California general contractors and trades (with plans to expand later).



You will use official government websites, PDFs, and AI tools to research and structure data into clean checklists. Strong attention to detail and comfort with AI tools are more important than deep prior experience.



# Key Responsibilities



- Research and document licensing/permit requirements for California Contractors State License Board (CSLB) classifications, county business licenses, workers’ compensation, general liability insurance, bonds, and related items.

- Build and maintain structured spreadsheets or database matrices (e.g., “For a General Contractor in Los Angeles doing residential remodeling ? list of 10–15 required items with expiry rules, links, and notes”).

- Review official sources (CSLB guides, county portals, state websites) and summarize rules clearly.

- Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.) to extract information from long PDFs and draft initial checklists — then verify accuracy against original sources.

- Flag ambiguous or conflicting information and escalate to the founder for review.

- Keep the requirements database up-to-date as rules change (monitor key portals monthly).

- Organize research findings in Notion, Airtable, or Google Sheets for easy use by the development team.



Requirements / What We’re Looking For



- Some experience in legal research, paralegal work, administrative compliance, or regulatory document review (even 6–12 months is helpful).

- Excellent English reading and writing skills — you must be able to summarize complex rules into simple, clear language.

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills (this role involves a lot of data accuracy).

- Comfortable using AI tools daily to speed up research (we will share effective prompts).

- Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision.

- Basic familiarity with U.S. government websites or licensing boards is a big plus (but not required — we will train you).

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace.



Nice-to-have (not required):

- Previous experience as a legal VA, paralegal assistant, or compliance support role.

- Experience working with construction, contractor licensing, or regulated industries.



# What We Offer



- Monthly compensation: $600–$800 (depending on experience and output quality).

- Flexible remote work (Philippines or similar time zones preferred for overlap with U.S. founder).

- Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving startup (potential for more hours and higher pay as the company scales).

- Clear weekly goals, templates, and direct guidance from the founder.

- Performance bonuses for high-quality, timely deliverables.



# How to Apply

Please reply with:

- Your resume or short bio highlighting any legal/research/compliance experience.

- Why you think you’d be a good fit for this role (2–3 sentences).

- A sample of any research or summarization work you’ve done (even a short example is fine).

title: Social Media & Community Manager (LinkedIn + Canva)
description:
Social Media & Community Manager

Female Lawyers' Club

Please note: applications must be submitted via the onlinejobs.ph messaging system only. Applications sent by
 will not be considered.

________________________________________

About Female Lawyers' Club

Female Lawyers' Club is a professional membership community for senior female lawyers in the UK and beyond. Through membership, online events and courses, we support women in the legal profession to build sustainable, well-paid and fulfilling careers.

Our members are experienced, senior professionals - partners, consultant solicitors, barristers and in-house counsel. The tone of everything we do reflects that: warm and human, but always professional.

The Founder, Rachel Spink, is a practising employment lawyer who runs Female Lawyers' Club alongside her legal work. This role is a key hire that will allow Rachel to focus on strategy, content and growing the business.

________________________________________

About the role

This is a part-time remote role starting at 5 hours per week, with the expectation that hours will grow as the business grows.

The main purpose of the role is to manage and grow Female Lawyers' Club's social media presence and 
munity, and to keep track of what is working so we can improve over time.

This is not a role for someone who simply wants to schedule posts. We are looking for someone who takes genuine ownership, thinks strategically about engagement, and understands how to communicate with a senior professional audience.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

Community engagement

• Managing and growing our LinkedIn group (hundreds of senior lawyers)

• Posting discussion prompts and conversation starters

• Welcoming new members and making them feel included

• Responding to comments professionally and warmly

• Supporting engagement in our members' WhatsApp group

• Sharing relevant articles and discussion topics

Social media content

• Turning blog posts and newsletters into LinkedIn and Instagram posts

• Creating LinkedIn carousels and graphics using Canva

• Scheduling 3–5 posts per week across platforms

• Repurposing existing content into new formats

• Suggesting new content ideas based on what is resonating with our audience

Performance tracking

• Keeping an ongoing record of key metrics: likes, comments, shares and engagement rates

• Tracking what types of content perform best and flagging patterns

• Making suggestions over time for how to improve performance based on the data

Design and content creation

• Creating social media graphics and carousel posts in Canva

• Maintaining consistency with the Female Lawyers' Club brand

• Occasionally creating simple PDFs, workbooks or event marketing materials

Website support (occasional)

• Uploading blog posts and updating website copy (Squarespace experience helpful but not essential)

________________________________________

What we are looking for

Essential:

• Excellent written English - this is the single most important requirement

• A professional, warm tone that is appropriate for senior lawyers

• Experience with LinkedIn, including LinkedIn groups

• Strong Canva skills with an eye for clean, professional design

• Ability to work independently and manage your own time without constant direction

• Reliable and responsive - you will be expected to communicate promptly

• Genuine interest in the mission of Female Lawyers' Club

Also valuable:

• Experience managing online communities

• Understanding of social media analytics and performance tracking

• Experience with Instagram

• Squarespace experience

________________________________________

Important note on tone

Our audience is made up of senior female lawyers - partners, barristers and experienced solicitors. The way we communicate with them must always be professional, warm and intelligent. It must never be overly casual, excitable or generic.

If you are used to writing for lifestyle, influencer or general consumer audiences, please consider carefully whether this role is the right fit. We are not looking for that style of content.

________________________________________

What it is like working with Rachel

• Rachel is kind, honest and wants you to succeed

• She is very busy, so she needs someone who can take real ownership of this role without needing constant direction

• She values reliability and clear communication above almost everything else

• Hours and pay can increase as the business grows

________________________________________

Hours and pay

• 5 hours per week to start

• Hours will increase as the business grows

• Rate is negotiable depending on experience

• Rachel is based in the UK so some overlap in working hours is needed

________________________________________

How to apply

Please apply via the onlinejobs.ph messaging system only. Do not send applications by
.

To be considered, please include all of the following in your message:

1. A brief introduction explaining why you are interested in this role and why you would be a good fit. Please keep this to a maximum of 150 words.

2. Answer this question: Below is a comment posted by a member inside a professional community for senior female lawyers. Please write a reply to this comment as if you were managing the community on behalf of the Founder.

"I've just made partner after twelve years. I honestly didn't think it would happen. I'm not sure whether to feel proud or just exhausted."

Your reply should be warm, genuine and professional. It should feel like it comes from a real person, not a corporate account. Maximum 5 sentences.

3. Share 2–3 examples of Canva graphics or social media posts you have created. A portfolio link is fine.

4. Please attach your CV or resume.

Please include the phrase "FLC April 2026" at the start of your message so that we know you have read the full description.

________________________________________

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.

title: Software Implementation Specialist
description:
# Software Implementation Specialist



**Location:** Remote (Philippines)

**Schedule:** US business hours, Eastern Time preferred

**Type:** Full-time



---



## About Company



We are a wealth management data infrastructure company. We help RIAs, broker-dealers, family offices, and TAMPs turn fragmented data into something they can actually use. We're a small, fast-moving team where your work is visible and your contributions matter.



---



## The Role



You'll be the bridge between our customers and our platform—the person who takes what a client needs and turns it into a working configuration.



This isn't a back-office role. You'll be on customer calls throughout the day, then in the platform making things happen. A typical day might start with a kickoff call for a new client, shift into configuring their data integrations, and end with troubleshooting an issue for an existing customer.



If you've worked at a development agency, digital consultancy, or software company where you balanced technical work with client interaction, you'll recognize the rhythm.



---



## What You'll Do



- Execute configuration work based on project plans and customer requests

- Join implementation calls, kickoffs, and status meetings

- Write SQL to query and validate data

- Modify HTML templates and work with JSON for integrations

- Document configurations and maintain project records

- Escalate to product and engineering when custom solutions are needed



---



## What We're Looking For



**Technical**

- Working knowledge of SQL—you can write queries, not just run them

- Comfortable reading and modifying HTML

- Experience with JSON in APIs, data structures, or config files



**Experience**

- 2+ years in a client-facing technical role at an agency, consultancy, or software company

- Track record of juggling multiple projects or clients at once

- Strong written and verbal English; comfortable on video calls with US clients



**Setup**

- Available during US Eastern business hours (roughly 8am–5pm ET)

- Reliable internet and a quiet space for calls

- Self-directed—you see a problem, you figure it out



Bonus: financial services, data integration, or SaaS implementation experience. None of it is required. Learning speed and clear communication matter more.



---



## Why 



You'll work directly with leadership and have real influence on how we serve customers. We're building something meaningful in an industry that's overdue for better technology, and we offer competitive compensation and a collaborative remote environment to match.



---



## How to Apply



Send your resume with a few sentences about a time you had to balance technical work with customer communication. We read every application and respond to everyone.

title: Video Editor & YouTube Strategist (Daily Reaction Content)
description:
About the Brand:

We run 'The Maximus Breakdown,' a highly active daily media brand focused on news, politics, and culture. We have a massive, established footprint on
 and Instagram, and our primary goal right now is to aggressively scale and monetize our YouTube channel. We need a reliable, sharp Video Editor to take over the daily production.



The Role:

This is a consistent, daily position. You will take raw reaction footage and turn it into a high-retention viewing experience.



Daily Long-Form: Edit ONE 8-12 minute 'Reaction Style' video per day.

Daily Short-Form: Extract 4-7 viral-ready 'Shorts' or 'Reels' from that daily long-form video.



The Editing Style: We do not use heavy B-roll. We focus on fast-paced 'Reaction' editing. This includes:

Dynamic Framing: Using punch-ins and zooms to emphasize facial reactions and key talking points.

Audio Mastering: Balancing the host's microphone audio with the original video audio so it sounds flawless.

On-Screen Graphics: Adding bold text call-outs for names or facts, and dynamic captions for the Shorts.



YouTube Growth & Bonus Skills:

We are looking for a partner to help build this channel. If you have proven experience growing a YouTube channel, that is a massive plus. If you can also create high-clickability thumbnails and handle the backend SEO/uploading, you will be moved to the front of the line.



Compensation & Growth:

Starting Salary: $75 USD per week.

Workload: 1 long-form edit + 4-7 shorts daily (Approximately 1.5–2 hours of work per day).

Growth: This is a performance-based partnership. As you help grow the YouTube channel, increase views, and boost monetization, your pay will increase right alongside it. We want you to win as the brand wins.



How to Apply:

Please send a link to your portfolio showing your best fast-paced or reaction-style edits. If you have YouTube management or thumbnail experience, include examples. To prove you pay attention to details, start your application with the word: POWER.

title: AI Engineer
description:
About Cynergists: We provide advanced AI Agents designed to empower businesses to automate workflows, maximize productivity, and unlock limitless growth. We don't just fill seats; we deploy operations. Cynergists is moving beyond traditional staffing to define the future of intelligent automation. 

The Role: We are looking for a hungry, tech-curious individual to join our team. You do not need years of tech sales experience to apply. If you are coachable and ready to learn, our proprietary AI Sales Trainer will get you up to speed quickly.

Your primary goal is simple: Talk to business owners, identify their operational "bottlenecks," and match them with the perfect AI Agent from our catalog. If we don't have an agent ready, you will help scope a Custom AI Build to solve their unique problem.

Key Responsibilities:

Diagnostic Selling: Engage with leads to understand their current workflows and pain points. You aren’t just selling; you are diagnosing inefficiencies.

The "Matchmaker" Process:

Assess the client’s needs.

Direct them to the specific AI Agent on our website that solves that problem.

If a pre-made Agent doesn't exist, coordinate with our tech team to propose a Custom AI Agent Build.

Rapid Skill Development: Work daily with Briggs, our AI Sales Trainer, to refine your pitch, learn objection handling, and master the art of AI consulting.

Pipeline Management: Utilize Go High Level (GHL) to track leads, schedule follow-ups, and manage your deals from initial conversation to close.

Market Feedback: Listen to what business owners are asking for and relay that back to the development team to help us build the next generation of AI Agents.

What We Are Looking For:

Coachability is King: We value the ability to learn over a 10-page resume. You must be willing to train with Briggs and adapt your approach.

Tech-Savvy Mindset: You don't need to be a coder, but you must be excited about AI and comfortable navigating software.

Problem-Solving Skills: You need to be able to listen to a business owner complain about a task and immediately think, "I have an Agent for that."

Communication: Clear, confident verbal and written communication skills are non-negotiable.

GHL Experience: Proficiency in Go High Level is a plus, but not required if you are a fast learner.

Why Join Cynergists?

Cutting-Edge Training: Access to Briggs, our AI Sales Trainer, providing you with real-time feedback and development.

Sell the Future: You aren't selling outdated services; you are selling the most in-demand technology in the world.

Competitive Commission: Uncapped earning potential based on performance.

Remote Freedom: Work from anywhere with a supportive, innovative team.

To Apply: If you are ready to pivot your career into the world of Artificial Intelligence, submit your resume to 
 us why you think AI is the future of business in your cover letter.

title: Ecommerce Operations VA
description:
Work Type: Remote

Schedule: Part-time (4–6 hours/day, with potential to expand)

Time Zone: Must work during US Pacific Time (live availability required)



About the Role:

We are a US based e-commerce company, selling water filtration and plumbing supplies, looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Operations VA to support daily execution across customer service, admin, and ecommerce operations.

This is a real-time, execution-focused role. You will be working live during US business hours, handling tasks as they come in, and ensuring operations run smoothly throughout the day.

This role is ideal for someone who is organized, proactive, and responsive, and can handle multiple responsibilities without constant supervision.

________________________________________

Primary Responsibilities:

• Handle customer service and scripted tech support 
, chat, and basic phone answering/routing) 

• Resolve customer issues related to orders, returns, and shipments 

• Input and update inventory data accurately 

• Perform basic inventory reconciliation tasks

• Communicate and assist across different teams (customer service, warehouse, operations) to ensure tasks are completed efficiently

• Maintain and update Google Sheets (sales tracking, operations logs, etc.) 

• Input weekly sales data into tracking sheets 

• Create and maintain packing sheets/catalogs in Google Sheets 

• Assist with placing purchase orders (POs) 

• Perform general administrative and operational support tasks as assigned 

• Execute tasks in real-time during shift and respond promptly to requests 

________________________________________

What This Job Is NOT:

• No advanced technical development work 

• No marketing strategy or ad management 

• No graphic design or branding work 

• No high-level business decision making 

• This is a hands-on execution and operations support role 

________________________________________

Required Skills:

• Strong English communication (written and verbal; phone capable) 

• Experience in customer service and scripted light tech support (ecommerce preferred) 

• Comfortable handling live tasks and real-time requests 

• Strong attention to detail (especially for orders and inventory) 

• Proficient in Google Sheets / Excel 

• Organized and able to track tasks and progress clearly 

• Ability to follow instructions and SOPs accurately 

• Reliable internet connection and stable work environment 

• Ability to work during US Pacific Time hours

________________________________________

Nice to Have:

• Experience with Shopify, Amazon, or ecommerce platforms 

• Experience with ShipStation or shipping tools 

• Experience handling returns and logistics issues 

• Basic understanding of inventory systems 

• Experience in operations or administrative roles in ecommerce 

________________________________________

Work Expectations:

• Real-time task execution during US business hours 

• Must be online and available throughout the shift 

• Fast response time to messages and task assignments 

• Tasks and progress must be clearly tracked and documented 

• Proactive mindset — do not wait for instructions when work is available 

• Consistent and clear communication is required 

• Stable, long-term working relationship preferred 

________________________________________

To Apply, Answer the following:

1. Customer Service Experience

Describe your experience handling customer support 
/chat/phone). 

2. Ecommerce Experience

Have you worked with Shopify, Amazon, or similar platforms? What did you do? 

3. Real-Time Work Experience

Have you worked in a role where you needed to be online and respond immediately during your shift? Please describe. 

4. Google Sheets Skills

What types of tasks have you done in Google Sheets or Excel? 

5. Handling Multiple Tasks

How do you manage multiple tasks coming in at the same time? 

6. Availability

8. Voice Recording Requirement

Please include a short voice recording (1–2 minutes) answering the following:

Applications that do not complete all requirements or do not follow instructions will not be considered.

title: AI User & Capcut Video Content Editor
description:
Hi there!



I’m looking for a motivated and reliable Virtual Assistant to help create AI recipe content using modern AI tools and simple editing workflows.



This role is ideal for someone who is curious about AI, excited by content creation, and willing to learn step by step. You do not need to be an expert already, but you do need to be genuinely interested in the space and open to improving.



You’ll be working with tools such as Veo Flow, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, and CapCut to help turn recipe ideas into engaging short-form videos.



This is a great opportunity for someone who wants to build valuable skills in AI content creation, short-form video production, and viral-style content workflows.



What You’ll Be Helping With



AI Content Creation



Following a step-by-step process to create AI recipe videos



Using AI tools to help generate scenes, voiceovers, visuals, and content ideas



Learning how different AI tools work together in a content workflow



Organizing prompts, assets, and project files



Tools You’ll Be Using -



Veo Flow



HeyGen



ElevenLabs



CapCut



Video Editing -



Editing short-form videos for platforms like TikTok, Reels, and Shorts



Adding captions, transitions, sound, music, and simple effects



Cleaning up clips and making videos feel smooth and engaging



General Support



Following instructions carefully



Keeping projects organized



Communicating progress clearly



Contributing ideas when appropriate



Helping improve the content process over time



Who This Role Is For



I’m mainly looking for someone who is:



Very willing to learn



Curious about AI and content creation



Passionate about online content and how videos perform



Reliable and consistent



Comfortable following a structured process



Open to a little creativity within the system



Interested in learning how to make content that has viral potential



You do not need years of experience. What matters more is your attitude, effort, curiosity, and willingness to improve.



Skills I’m Looking For -



Important



Basic familiarity with CapCut



Good English communication



Attention to detail



Ability to follow instructions step by step



Organized and dependable



Helpful but not required



Any exposure to AI tools



Interest in short-form content



Basic understanding of TikTok, Reels, or Shorts



Creative eye for pacing and engaging edits



Pay and Growth



Starting pay: $3/hour



Progression available for the right person



Long-term opportunity if it is a good fit



You’ll also gain valuable hands-on skills in:



AI tools



content creation



video editing



short-form content workflows



viral-style content production



Why This Role Is Valuable



This is not just a basic VA job. You’ll be learning practical skills in one of the fastest-growing areas online right now: AI-driven content creation.



If you are someone who wants to grow, build experience, and become highly skilled in AI content and editing, this could be a very good opportunity.



How to Apply



Please send:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience with CapCut or any video editing



Any experience with AI tools, even if it is beginner level



Your availability and preferred working hours



Why this role interests you



A short note on why you think you would be a good fit



If possible, also include:



Any sample edits



Any content you’ve worked on before



Any AI tools you’ve tried or want to learn



I’m looking for someone who is hungry to learn, easy to work with, and excited to grow in this space.



If that sounds like you, I’d love to hear from you.

title: Ad Creative Assistant (Content Editing & Social Posting)
description:
Ad Creative Assistant (Content Editing & Social Posting – 2 Brands)

________________________________________

Job Overview

We are hiring a Creative Assistant to help edit existing photos/videos and turn them into usable marketing content.

You will be working across TWO brands:

1. eCommerce brand (established, 10+ years) selling water filtration and plumbing supplies — primary focus 

2. Local plumbing service (new startup) — secondary, lighter workload 

This is a production-focused role, not a design or strategy role.

________________________________________

Important: Multi-Brand Responsibility

This role requires you to:

• Work across two different brands 

• Follow different styles and content patterns for each 

• Stay organized and consistent when switching between brands 

We will provide:

• Clear examples 

• Templates 

• Guidelines 

Your role is to follow and apply each brand correctly, not create from scratch.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Content Editing

• Resize and crop images/videos for: 

o Social media 
, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, X) 

o Ads (Meta, Google, TikTok) 

o Website use (Shopify) 

• Create simple variations (text overlays, formatting) 

• Cut and edit short clips from longer videos 

________________________________________

Video Review & Clip Selection

• Review longer raw videos and identify usable highlights 

• Select key 
nts that can be turned into short-form content 

• Create short clips for social media (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) 

• Focus on clear, useful segments (no over-editing required) 

________________________________________

Social Media Posting

• Post content on a fixed schedule 

• Follow provided templates and examples 

• Maintain consistency for both brands 

________________________________________

Content Organization

• Organize files in Google Drive/Network Drive

• Maintain clear folder structure and naming 

• Keep assets separated and easy to find per brand 

________________________________________

Light Content Direction

• Provide simple feedback on raw content: 

o Angles 

o Lighting 

o Missing shots 

• Suggest what content is needed (before/after, demo, etc.) 

________________________________________

Branding (Execution-Level Only)

• Follow brand examples and templates 

• Match existing style and formatting 

• Maintain consistency across posts 

You are not required to create branding strategy

________________________________________

Work Allocation

• Primary Focus (~70%) – eCommerce brand 

o Product content and marketing assets 

• Secondary Focus (~30%) – Local plumbing service 

o Simple, consistent social posting 

o Lower complexity 

________________________________________

Requirements

• Detail-oriented and highly organized 

• Able to follow instructions exactly 

• Comfortable managing tasks across multiple brands 

• Fast and responsive in communication 

• Able to recognize patterns and apply them consistently 

• Able to review content and identify useful clips from longer videos 

________________________________________

Tools & Setup (Required)

You must have your own tools and active subscriptions to perform this role.

This includes:

• Canva (Pro preferred) 

• CapCut or equivalent editing software 

• Reliable computer capable of handling image/video editing 

We do not provide software subscriptions for this role.

________________________________________

Work Style Requirement (Important)

This role is best for someone who:

• Prefers clear systems and structure 

• Can handle repeatable tasks across multiple brands 

• Focuses on execution and efficiency 

• Communicates clearly and responds quickly 

This role is NOT suitable if you:

• Prefer creative freedom 

• Like to redesign or change styles frequently 

• Want to create new concepts from scratch 

________________________________________

Asset Ownership, Licensing & File Delivery

All content and assets are the property of the company.

You are required to:

• Provide all final edited files in full resolution 

• Provide source/editable files when applicable (e.g., Canva projects) 

• Upload and organize all assets in our Google Drive/Network Drive 

• Maintain clear file naming and folder structure 

All work created under this role is considered work-for-hire.

The company retains full ownership and licensing rights to all content created, including unrestricted rights to use, modify, distribute, and publish the content.

We must have full access and control of all assets at all times.

No files should be kept privately or withheld.

________________________________________

Compensation

• Long-term position 

• Consistent workload 

________________________________________

Application Questions

To be considered, please answer the following:

1. Provide examples of content you’ve edited 

2. What tools do you use? (include your active subscriptions) 

3. How do you organize files/folders for multiple projects or brands? 

4. If given 20 photos + 5 videos, what is your first step? 

5. How do you improve low-quality content? 

6. If given 5 sample posts, how do you match the style? 

7. Do you prefer following systems or creating your own approach? Why? 

8. How do you manage tasks when working on multiple brands? 

9. Have you worked with long videos before? How do you d
 which parts to clip? 

10. Internet speed + backup plan 

11. Availability (hours/week, timezone) 

________________________________________

Final Note

You will be working across two brands, so organization and consistency are critical.

We are looking for someone who can:

• Follow structure 

• Communicate clearly and respond quickly 

• Stay organized 

• Execute reliably 

• Manage multiple workflows without confusion

title: Web Content Writer
description:
A Web Content Writer specializing in SEO is responsible for creating engaging, high-quality content that improves a website’s visibility in search engines and attracts target audiences. This role involves researching relevant keywords, understanding search intent, and producing optimized content such as website pages, service descriptions, and landing pages. The writer ensures all content is clear, informative, and aligned with the brand’s voice while strategically incorporating keywords, meta descriptions, headers, and internal links to boost search rankings.



Key responsibilities include conducting keyword research, analyzing competitors, and identifying content opportunities that drive organic traffic. The writer collaborates with marketing teams to develop content strategies, update existing pages for better performance, and follow SEO best practices such as proper formatting, readability, and mobile optimization.



A successful SEO Web Content Writer has strong writing and editing skills, a solid understanding of on-page SEO, and the ability to adapt content for different audiences and industries. Attention to detail, creativity, and the ability to meet deadlines are essential. This role plays a critical part in increasing brand awareness, driving website traffic, and converting visitors into customers.

title: Senior UX/UI Designer + WordPress Builder (Kadence) – Full Website Redesign
description:

This role covers both creating website designs and building pages in WordPress using Kadence.



Join me in transforming webiste from a basic blog into Florida’s go-to lifestyle and travel platform, packed with inspiring local content and expert resources.





Scope of Work:



* Full Website UX Audit (Home, Blog, Posts, Categories, Contact)

* Information Architecture (navigation, structure, hierarchy)

* Design System (colors, typography, spacing, consistency)

* Homepage redesign

* Blog post template (for SEO content)

* Sales page template (for services and digital products)

* Service page layout optimization (conversion-focused)



Important – Development Setup:



You will build the NEW version of the full website in this dev environment (not just a few pages).

You must:



You’ll work in a dedicated dev environment, designing and building the NEW full version of the website from scratch. Nothing touches the live site until everything is approved.

Homepage + design direction

Blog post template + sales page template

Core pages and refinements
